name: Claire Low, NDRC
subject: The homestretch of the 2025 elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
The fight for fair maps happens in the states, and that’s why we’re laser-focused on the Virginia and Pennsylvania 2025 elections.
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115170506/569419399/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwYTk4N2MwLWZkOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UVoSLhiiSS7ppQEGmZ8KKoR_WOAmHG_JeuvTkvooHf4=&emci=535be28f-1390-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=00a987c0-fd90-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, That chill in the air means the back-to-school rush is upon us, the leaves will soon begin to fall — _and the homestretch of election season is upon us_. This might not feel like an election year to everyone, but we have a saying here at the NDRC: **There are no off years for redistricting.** That couldn’t be truer this year, as we’re beating back attacks on the right to vote like we haven’t seen since the Jim Crow era. We’ve identified several critical state-level elections we believe will play a critical role in the future of our representative democracy:
* In **Virginia** , we’ve proudly endorsed Abigail Spanberger for governor. And we’re working to ensure Virginia’s House of Delegates has a pro-democracy majority, endorsing 44 Democracy Defenders to help protect against state-level gerrymandering and other anti-democracy measures we’re seeing in Republican-controlled state legislatures from Texas to Missouri.

* In **Pennsylvania** , we’re laser-focused on three state Supreme Court seats that will play a huge role in protecting this state’s firewall against unfairly gerrymandered districts in this critical battleground.

**As the last few months have made abundantly clear, the fight for fair maps happens in these state-level elections. That’s why the NDRC has mounted a state-by-state strategy to protect our democracy. While most outsiders are already focused on the midterms, we’re working hard to ensure these 2025 elections go well for our democracy.** [**In this homestretch, will you step up with a generous donation to ensure the NDRC can fight for pro-democracy majorities? Your gift will ensure we can keep up our work in states across the country and win big in 2025 and beyond.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115170507/569419400/1110433579?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_ElectionPreview_email_20250913-NDRC-Tier1-ElectionPreview_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250913-NDRC-Tier1-ElectionPreview_&utm_campaign=ElectionPreview&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjAwYTk4N2MwLWZkOTAtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=UVoSLhiiSS7ppQEGmZ8KKoR_WOAmHG_JeuvTkvooHf4=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Critical, year-round program
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks.
Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system.
Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help .
Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091325_1&amount=24]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?express_lane=true&refcode=091325_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091325_1&amount=36]
Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years.
The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future.
New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. Please, can you pitch in with $24 or whatever you can to help us register a wave of new voters ahead of this year's registration deadlines? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-voterregistration?refcode=091325_1&amount=24]
Thank you,
Voter Action Project's Registration Team
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091325_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091325_1&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] Our voter registration work doesn't end, folks. Despite vote-suppressing state legislatures making it harder to register to vote -- passing bills to stop organizations like ours and our partners on the ground from helping potential voters navigate the increasingly murky rules around voter registration -- we're still pulling out all the stops to bring voters into the system. Voter registration is a critical part of grassroots efforts to protect voting rights. The more people who vote, the more our government looks like we, the people. But to get to the point where every voice is heard, we need your help . Just $3 can help us register a new voter. Will you chip in $24 or more today to help register 8 new voters? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Voter participation has been increasing, and young people -- a major target of opponents of voting rights -- see the importance of voting now more than ever. Voting quickly becomes a habit -- a habit our democracy sorely needs to fulfill the promise of the American dream. Overwhelming key states with new voter registrations can help turn the tide against the voter suppression laws we've seen passed the last few years. The next election will determine whether our democracy stays mired in the darkness and conspiracy theories we hear every day or if we can reclaim our rights -- from voting to choice and more -- and march forward to a better future. New voter registration -- at just about $3 per new voter -- can make a huge difference. name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie. None of us will ever forget him.
body:
#
[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69479&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69479]

Friend,

Charlie Kirk didn’t just live a full life...

He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with
truth.

With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a
generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above
all, to point people back to God.

And in the end — _Charlie gave it all._

No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he
started.

Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind
— _and the calling that now belongs to us._

WE MADE THIS TRIBUTE TO HONOR THE MAN WHO GAVE EVERYTHING... AND TO
REMIND THE WORLD THAT HIS MISSION WILL PRESS ON:

[https://secure.anedot.com/turning-point-usa/2e7c1ee5-5f6b-41f8-81ae-eeaffbbbb106?source_code=MAWCO69479&utm_medium=email&utm_source=hardask_acq&utm_campaign=ck_legacy&utm_content=ab_test_a&utm_term=MAWCO69479]

All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._

For Charlie,

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU LETTER (VPP)
subject: Justice Sotomayor just issued a stark warning
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
You need to read this
| **Justice Sotomayor just issued a dire warning about where our country is headed:** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93947?t=6&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-) Sonia Sotomayor has been on the frontlines of the fight against Trump — from SLAMMING the immunity decision to standing up for reproductive rights!

[**As one of the few defenders of our democracy left on the Supreme Court, we’re sending Sotomayor a letter thanking her for her incredible work. ONLY 30 SPOTS LEFT: SIGN YOUR NAME NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93947?t=7&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-) | [**Donate $3 to sign the letter now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93947?t=8&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-)
---
TO: Justice Sonia Sotomayor
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: Thank you for taking a stand. **Dear Justice Sotomayor,

Thank you for standing up for our democracy against Donald Trump’s increasingly extremist agenda and unconstitutional power grab.**

Your scathing dissent against the MAGA Justices’ immunity decision was historic, and you haven’t backed down even a little bit since then.

**As Trump tries to seize more and more control from Congress and the courts, your resilience is needed now more than ever.**

I’m sick and tired of the GOP letting him off scot-free — so I’m doing everything in my power to elect Democrats and ensure we appoint more amazing Supreme Court Justices like YOU in the near future.

[**I know you’re facing relentless attacks from Trump and his MAGA minions, so I’m signing this thank you letter and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to help Democrats keep fighting for justice »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93947?t=9&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/93947?t=10&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
—The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=21240%2E878179%2EnmUpV-)

name: James Talarico
subject: Please make one of the first donations to my campaign for the U.S. Senate.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
After a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision...
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94908?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ)
Peter —
I’ve heard from a lot of Texans this summer. And after a great deal of reflection and prayer, I’ve made a decision:
I’m running for the U.S. Senate.
**[I’m asking you to make one of the first donations to my campaign. Split it between my campaign and State Democrats Committee. This is a massive undertaking, and it would mean the world to me to know you have my back.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94908?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94908?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ)**
Right now, there’s something broken in America. Our economy is broken. Our politics are broken. Even our relationships with each other feel broken.
**That’s because the most powerful people in the world want it that way.**
The biggest divide in America is not left versus right — it’s top versus bottom.
Billionaires want us looking left and right at each other instead of looking up at them.
The people at the top work so hard to keep us angry and divided because our unity is a threat to their wealth and power. So their cable news networks and their social media algorithms tear us apart.
They divide us by party, by race, by gender, by religion so we don’t notice they’re defunding our schools, gutting our healthcare, and cutting taxes for themselves and their rich friends.
It’s the oldest strategy in the world: divide and conquer. But we will not be conquered.
**The fight ahead will not be easy. We’re the underdogs.**
We’re going up against these billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. We’re going up against a rigged system. And we’re going up against a lot of money.
But I’m a former middle school teacher — I don’t scare easily. And Texans don’t scare easily.
**Big Money is powerful, but it's nothing compared to people power.**
That’s why this is going to be a campaign fueled by people like you. I’ve never taken a dime of corporate PAC money, and I refuse to start now. So I need you with me.
**[Please split a contribution between my campaign for the U.S. Senate and State Democrats Committee today to become a Founding Donor. We need as many people as possible chipping in on day one to prove our movement is strong enough.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94908?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=5&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=6&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94909?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94908?refcode=em20250913-9416&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ)
---
We're going to make history, and we're going to do it together.
Let’s go.
James

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=12&akid=9416%2E614464%2EyBcVhJ).

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: The People’s Pardon Of Rudy Giuliani
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
My last chance. My Hail Mary.

| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr438m4aidi768j3bssuvr5ugpo0huo0e8sviek8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2o33cjh2bs)
---
Friend,
---
Believe me, writing this letter was not my first choice...
---
_As a matter of fact, it’s my _last_ _resort_. _
---
**You see, I’m writing to you as a man who’s run out of time, resources, and options ahead of the TRIAL OF MY LIFE.**
---
**A Democrat Attorney General is making me stand in a rigged trial for bogus state-level crimes, because she knows that not even the most powerful man on the face of the planet – President Trump – can save me with a _federal_ pardon in _state_ court.**
---
And so, today, I’m not reaching out as America’s Mayor, not as a former prosecutor, not even as President Trump’s former attorney, but as a grandfather and a patriot who’s staring down a 20-year prison sentence for doing what I believed – _and KNOW_ – was RIGHT.
---
The Democrats and their Deep State goons think they’ve finally got me. They’ve left me with no escape, no lifeline – **especially after they’ve already STRIPPED me of my law licenses!**
---
_No viable pardon from the President.
No protection.

name: Winsome
subject: One final message

name: Updates For Great Americans
subject: Ten Paradoxes of Our Age
body:
Tech is moving fast. Don't get left behind. Get your early copy of the Stanford Emerging Tech Review now.

# The Stanford Emerging Tech Review 2025
| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2hb1j1m472o025lpttnb2iumbrms1k8jajtfpu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

Have you noticed how our world seems full of contradictions lately?
Prosperity is rising. Yet freedom, in many places, is retreating.

Global diplomacy expands. But so do threats.

Cultural traditions persist. Still, they're strained by mass migration and ideological division.
---
|
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zshrg13a50u61iu94nbkck4p88op1i72ic5uf4ao_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)
---
| | These aren't just abstract concepts--they're reshaping the world we live in right now.

And if we don't understand them, we risk misunderstanding the forces at work and misjudging our response.

That's why the Hoover Institution is sharing a **powerful new analysis from Senior Fellow Victor Davis Hanson:_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_.**

In it, he outlines ten defining paradoxes of our time, including:
* Why economic growth doesn't always bring political freedom
* How diplomacy can coexist with rising global insecurity
* What happens when cultural pressures outpace integration

Whether you're concerned about America's future role in the world or seeking clarity amid global confusion, this piece offers a timely perspective.

These paradoxes are reshaping our world, and understanding them is crucial.

"If we do not understand the paradoxes of our age, we will continue to be confused by the outcomes." -- Victor Davis Hanson

**Download your free copy of '_Ten Paradoxes of Our Age_ ' now and gain the insights you need to navigate our complex world.**

Access your free copy today: [https://resources.hoover.org/ten-paradoxes-of-our-age](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqml0in678g565tmtrd0o5rsaktm957n511m5k40_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

[Make a Gift to Hoover](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5i4g9aekc734pjopu5uctomfu53ap841fdr3nrg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)
With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world.

Hoover Institution, 434 Galvez Mall, Stanford University, Stanford, CA 94305 USA
---
---

---

name: The Turning Point USA Family
subject: All of us will miss Charlie
body:
With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpjb5d749o7tncnld0f8elrv84jlcbl29vv1uq8g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)
---
Patriot,Charlie Kirk didn't just live a full life... He showed us what it meant to live boldly, love deeply, and lead with truth. With every ounce of his strength, he worked tirelessly to wake up a generation... To tell the truth... To save our country... And, above all, to point people back to God. And in the end -- _Charlie gave it all._ No one can replace him. But all of us can carry forward with what he started.Patriot, we want to give you a glimpse into the legacy he left behind -- _and the calling that now belongs to us._ **We made this tribute to honor the man who gave everything ... And to remind the world that his mission will press on:**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zurglgdk6lca9hh1a2qple2qmk5lsqqu9qq1tqkg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm2p71cph2bs)

---
All of us will miss Charlie. _None of us will ever forget him._ For Charlie, \- The Turning Point USA Family

name: AMAC Action
subject: The next 200 days
body:
If you received this email, it means you’ve been identified as a strong conservative patriot

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zl510l4po9n1qo4hesm0qsj8uobohegkb1dtchko_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow Senior, If you received this email, it means you’ve been identified as a strong conservative patriot—**[and that’s why I need you to represent your community in an important survey.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlv0dmq0vqohoegu4i2bpm006fedl0pstesfaspg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)** My friend, please take just three minutes right now to complete the official [**_NEXT 200 DAYS Senior’s Agenda Survey_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmeet6o49cibjs0puljfoknt72skr1n1o464k9no_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs) and submit it right away.
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7f10lr8k8d9hra8o5i7k46pjle5cvts6phpe0k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)
---
The beginning of August marked the end of President Trump’s first 200 days in office! And I’m sure I don’t need to tell you it has been a historic success unlike anything we’ve ever seen before. From slashing billions in wasteful spending, to deporting thousands of dangerous illegal immigrants, he’s already accomplished so much in such a short time. But there’s so much still to do if we’re truly going to make America great again. **[That’s why I sent you this _NEXT 200 DAYS Senior’s Agenda Survey_.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvrvdg17bcdkjj176ojj1igk4l6d24k1m1j717t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)**
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd3sjkrlhv39da8rjakoresafs8ok6k9bk5r42l8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)
---
And with razor-thin margins in Congress, we can’t afford to be anything but laser-focused on the most critical issues affecting Seniors like us—especially as the all-important Mid-term Elections inch ever closer... To put it bluntly, there’s absolutely no time to lose.Because Conservative Seniors like you and I have been betrayed by the very groups that say they speak for us.Groups like the AARP claim they’re on Seniors’ side. But they certainly don’t speak for Conservative Seniors like us. On the contrary – they’re pushing an extreme Far-Left agenda that goes against everything you and I believe in!The AARP fought for the Democrats’ so-called “Inflation Reduction Act” that spent billions of your tax dollars on big-government programs. They’ve pushed policies that threaten your hard-earned benefits like Medicare and Social Security. And time after time, they’ve blocked any attempt to roll back ObamaCare and give you more control of your health care. **[Friend, that’s why your answers to this survey are critically important.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4pkp40b4oai2d752j2ir0ckdcl03n281n61st18_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs) **→ You’re telling Congress the AARP DOES NOT speak for you -- or for any Conservative Senior, for that matter. → You’re warning Democrats in Washington you REFUSE to sit silently by while they collude with the Liberal AARP to block President Trump’s America First agenda.→ And you’re giving my team and me here at AMAC Action valuable information about the issues that matter most to Conservative Seniors.Because unlike the Liberal AARP, AMAC Action puts Conservative Seniors like you FIRST. **[That’s why I need you to take just a few minutes right now to complete your official _NEXT 200 DAYS Senior’s Agenda Survey_ and submit it to me.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zd98jtug2mo841d6tibgvn7pva6lfkhtnhmqag5o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs) **
---
[ **TAKE THE SURVEY** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7aebhcblc3kndscgs3tsg7q4vd2kn9d6006nhm8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)
---
With your survey, you’ll be able to speak and advocate for Conservative Seniors in your state on what parts of President Trump’s America First Agenda you want us to focus our efforts on: → Abolishing harmful government agencies and slashing wasteful spending of your tax dollars.→ Making President Trump’s tax cuts permanent and ending the tax on Social Security.→ Stopping Radical District Attorneys, funded by George Soros, who are refusing to enforce laws and releasing violent criminals into our communities. → Shutting down the tidal wave of illegal immigrants and deadly drugs that poured over our borders.→ Protecting your hard-earned benefits like Social Security and Medicare.→ Ending threats to your grandchildren like Critical Race and Transgender Ideologies in schools.→ Securing Election Integrity and protecting seniors’ votes from fraud.**[If we don’t stake our claim with a clear, aggressive Conservative Agenda for Seniors, the Liberal AARP will continue to claim they represent us.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8j9p7uqcj4llegfqi02ng7rgv02k5rvutv39ueg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs) ** They already threw Seniors like you and me “under the bus” during President Trump’s first administration by blocking his attempts to repeal Obamacare and give you more control of your health care. Unless we take a stand right now, they’ll double down and do even more damage. In case we haven’t met yet, my name is Rebecca Weber. I’m a fellow Senior, and I’m the head of AMAC Action. If you’ve heard of us, you know that “AMAC” stands for the Association of Mature American Citizens.And “Action” is what we’re known for. When it comes to standing up for the rights of Conservative Seniors like you, no other advocacy group in the nation is more influential than AMAC Action. AMAC Action is a force to be reckoned with in Washington. With 75 chapters, 300 delegates, and now more than 2 MILLION AMAC members and rapidly growing -- we’re fighting for YOU. Our “feet on the street” advocates contact Members of Congress and state legislators on your behalf. And 400,000 AMAC advocates (and counting!) have sent over a million messages to Congress, state legislatures, and regulatory agencies like the FTC, HHS, and CMS to make sure the voice of Conservative Seniors is heard on key issues.During President Trump’s first term in office, we were a treasured resource. → President Trump called us to the White House to tell him what AMAC members thought about historic regulatory reform.→ We were right there in the Rose Garden when President Trump announced a life-saving AMAC-supported plan that reduces insulin costs for you and your loved ones. → Two of our AMAC members were invited to the White House to meet with the President, Vice President, Attorney General, police officers, and other select citizens to discuss the best ways to protect our brave police. → And when AMAC Action bombarded the Governors of New York, New Jersey, Pennsylvania, and Michigan -- questioning their fatal decision to send COVID-19 contagious patients from hospitals to nursing homes resulting in the deaths of thousands of Seniors -- President Trump’s Department of Justice took action. **[Now that he’s back in the White House, AMAC Action is fighting alongside President Trump for YOU and for your fellow Conservative Seniors across the country once again.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg32cnki475d0ftr1mmgr8646sae2ku2uelgrr88_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)** While the AARP spent last year showing noncitizens how to access Medicare and propping up the disaster that is Obamacare......AMAC Action has been busy:

* Teaming up with great American patriots like Attorney General Ed Meese, Dr. Alveda King, and LTC Allen West to secure our elections and protect Senior voters from the Left’s predatory tactics that STEAL the votes of elderly Americans.
* Battling to protect Medicare and promote drug pricing transparency.
* Fighting to preserve tax cuts, stop ESG investing, and so much more.

---
We’ve never faltered or slowed in our fight for YOU -- and that will continue through the rest of 2025 and beyond.We’re not going to let the Liberal AARP pretend like they speak for America’s Seniors -- not when we know they are in lockstep with the Radical Left’s extreme agenda.But first, we need to hear from you. **[Would you take just a few minutes right now to fill out your official _NEXT 200 DAYS Senior’s Agenda Survey_ and submit it right away?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zrqadlbe5schbvfsuletr8qrib65iim9733799d8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4cph2bs)**

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to children’sentertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zv16evh3ptjpi4tlh13lr3hb64mnrvpb56524r78_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8bnchkv7ct32i32j1kc4bo09aare2bt0ps2ui7g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2znilml1i7qui5udmkegcgcplmguoj9k4dkp5i97g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zfdthva0nru2cajl9a9iupq9k5e5mmg2ee2d88c8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt59orc5or1re6mji4d99bm7ebe13ablebji1igo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zout00dp67bnifrb6pfq6rvukrpgvcbafl5qcta0_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zd54ffmi7qihkmo3qjcgjphd7mvg000t06nu3u0o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za0b1c89esia5bk40pif9ogvm0juq5jadgujpvlg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ziv3pq52kt3p2rkubneunhctc3si79a4spubpv78_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gmeor4c1h2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Fans of the Bee New Content is Coming But We Need Your Help
body:
The Babylon Bee changed the comedy game forever when we launched 9 years ago.

| | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zcbdeu28870maob6jbm03cr8s6d1e0pkjqo75a6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs)
---
The Babylon Bee changed the comedy game forever when we launched 9 years ago. Now, we're taking on unfunny, woke Hollywood with brand-new shows, sketches, web series, and movies, all from the minds that come up with the fake news headlines you read every day. [It's all in our new streaming platform, Bee Minus](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2v5pa23vjtiggcvm83hm398ve8968aumcf3nr98_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs), and you can both support The Babylon Bee's mission and access all our exclusive content by joining today.
---
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z19jeb1b2oocrt1tn7qvav9g1gkj7dvqdi77k0lo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs)

[ **SUBSCRIBE TODAY**](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zlbdtc7ur5q0tshcl1ldh1bqn6j6pthctafj53g8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs)
---
Why another streaming service? Because making great, funny sketches and shows is expensive. And we need you to help us make these things a reality.
---
| | What can you expect to receive as a [Bee supporter and Bee Minus subscriber? ](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zr9s990ge5lou9mok5kbd0nhv1deh2cepahaatmg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs)
* Early and exclusive access to ad-free comedy sketches, shows, series, and more, including Woke Jesus, Satan's MasterClass, and the upcoming **Californians Move to Texas Season 2.**
* Access to full length films written and produced by The Babylon Bee, including our first first documentary, **January 6: The Most Deadliest Day.**
* Plus all the pre-existing benefits of a premium subscription, from an ad-free experience to the headline forum where you can join in the creative process.

---
Wow. That's a ton of stuff. But really, this is all a way to say "thank you" to you for helping us keep the lights on all this time. The Bee has been primarily reader-supported for years, and now we're giving back with tons of [exclusive content](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0551aatqaa7s1hksed611p6te0afospta4f354o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3gm1pb4cjh2bs) just for you, the people who make running The Babylon Bee possible.

Friend,

JD Vance is ALWAYS proving why he's the best Vice President in our nation's history -- _securing the border, fighting for American jobs, defending our families, and standing up to the radical Left without hesitation._

subject: One final message

name: The Babylon Bee
subject: Fans of the Bee New Content is Coming But We Need Your Help
body:
The Babylon Bee changed the comedy game forever when we launched 9 years ago.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5s1poe9j1atkr8ab396nnp1ilh3ieed9e3fj3mo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs)
---
The Babylon Bee changed the comedy game forever when we launched 9 years ago. Now, we're taking on unfunny, woke Hollywood with brand-new shows, sketches, web series, and movies, all from the minds that come up with the fake news headlines you read every day. [It's all in our new streaming platform, Bee Minus](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp9ep2qpccbbrvcjeggk6tjs4msg49asdoenh0n8_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs), and you can both support The Babylon Bee's mission and access all our exclusive content by joining today.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlink95tr880u2jo6g38045vmr7c5m26jr5arkso_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs)
---
[ **SUBSCRIBE TODAY**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zp8sj13fomoovljs9srb8qcr2llcmck7brhgb3eo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs)
---
Why another streaming service? Because making great, funny sketches and shows is expensive. And we need you to help us make these things a reality.
---
| | What can you expect to receive as a [Bee supporter and Bee Minus subscriber? ](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zuk05bs1vo8c3o5bph1p2gg7gad9h4cdb3ggqdpg_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs)
* Early and exclusive access to ad-free comedy sketches, shows, series, and more, including Woke Jesus, Satan's MasterClass, and the upcoming **Californians Move to Texas Season 2.**
* Access to full length films written and produced by The Babylon Bee, including our first first documentary, **January 6: The Most Deadliest Day.**
* Plus all the pre-existing benefits of a premium subscription, from an ad-free experience to the headline forum where you can join in the creative process.

---
Wow. That's a ton of stuff. But really, this is all a way to say "thank you" to you for helping us keep the lights on all this time. The Bee has been primarily reader-supported for years, and now we're giving back with tons of [exclusive content](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9hjpjfpb7rfeu3ohf4gqv65l6d2vue7n8h8e83o_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs) just for you, the people who make running The Babylon Bee possible.
Keep your favorite satire site free and independent. Support The Babylon Bee. Subscribe to Bee Minus today.
---
[ **SUPPORT THE BABYLON BEE**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znc9f3oqsmmaij5gkshj74plt4h8ad9krpp6phbo_rp22sh2s8i6epb7c3im4p36clh2bs)
---
Love,
Kyle Mann
Editor-in-Chief
---

name: The Flyover
subject: UK Conservatives Protest, Mortgage Rates Drop, and Orchids Are Lucky
body:
More than 110,000 protesters [marched through central London](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL1ugzAQgJ_GbEb-DWHw0IUtXTsiB5-D2wOjswPK21dUVV-g2-k76XTf93Ebbz5hWh_vfgFXYx5XOApCrUDj82vKawHafU07lI1yhVKXTKMSynLRc2nG4BO-RtMEFwEU6Aac7Gx3NUYr28wOeuO7q7x2d-2DiEHq2Mu71jEKBdZcmuTOa6KXRgphlWlN7HtrjdFhsspfLDMCQqqZ2s-c1jpDxFfegdopLw26udatMP3G1MDUcBxH-yynxLlmajjHk2fCwNTgqaYJ4UR_EpqpAfMa8sq3jGkCfic_AY-ZOHp6AKe0e-S_AUpDLmxHQkzl0jEjHotP-PNN_VfC3anvAAAA__-ea4ZE) on Saturday, carrying flags of England and Britain, in one of the biggest right-wing demonstrations of modern times in the U.K.

## Conservative Protesters Pack London Streets
More than 110,000 protesters [marched through central London](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHu3CAMxp-GbDmBQ8JlYOjC9u_aMeLAuaMl-AS-RHn7KlX7BN0s6yf7-30_vpYvn3Iqz-9-Q8srLQWPlpEZ6_L5Fag0rLvntGN7V2JsvFFdQMLYy7lXeok-5XPRXbQrIuDQoVVmNHetBxi7l1WP-_owcXqgNyHAFHU06-BViH4wwz10yV7X5Ky0knIEfdPrPI-j1kMMI_hpFFpiTEz19pNS4Reu-aQd6y3Q1mX7Yn43MXwT4AS44zhun-aZoj8vQIBrTPUU4C4zAe5NOXEK13g9FuDkLMCpQYDLVCKV_kIC9n-FsbbeF079lp7VF_6375m27ewrPVJpVAS4-6S0mqdZSiPAddXG95FyTm0yQsvn5lP-E5r_q-ndwu8AAAD__6c1k2A) on Saturday, carrying English and British flags, in one of the country's largest modern-day conservative demonstrations. A crowd [stretching three-quarters of a mile](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGurCAURb8GOwwijFpQvMZuXvtKg3DU8wZhAmc03q-_8f7C7Xayk5291r_n9LQYMK5_7Q6GljRFOEsAIsjT5-VSLJAPS3hAeedEUGhPeZJCai4G3qjJWwzXpCpvFgAJbQWm6XTXK9VKXW2mscPctUI0bnC2123Xg1L97PzQLuLRLxWae00MjWqE0FLVahkGrZVqvdPSPjRTAjxSyvX_hJE2WMKVDsi1S3sVzEb0Lqz9w-TI5HieZ-3mclPcPZPjHZkcQ4o-Rf6JSMBpA_7CuPq082xDuHjKq434BZ7PF19s5hnXjbh1hAcW4pT2_eI5zRhLikyOVTb-fWIIWB4dU2LdLYafS_Qrj4eR3wEAAP__tiKKpQ) from Big Ben to beyond Waterloo station rallied for free speech, British heritage and culture, and U.S. conservative advocate Charlie Kirk. The gathering was organized by Tommy Robinson's Unite the Kingdom. Protesters were kept apart from a nearby Stand Up to Racism counter-protest attended by about 5,000 people. More than [1,000 Metropolitan Police officers were deployed](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFutDAQhJ_GdIfsZQ0_hYu_obu0KZEPr--cGHyyN_jI00fkFdKNNJpPmu_9Ol9tiGG7v9mVDPs0b1RLJGbK89fnkrZCebccdirPnJgKrynPIEFf5HhRODsb4jFj44wnAuoaMmrQwz_EDnTzMN3Y951btHcISjk7oELrvVSqt67ztyaYkyZHhUpKDdiiH0etEc8V2F4LlOQCp9x-pLDxg3w80k65XdLaRPNgfhbR_RcwCZhqre3ttpydgOk8I2CymcMS6YxLPRx9v6J8xdRk4541xBhKPwiU99WG-EvlP6nYDfwEAAD__xcRc4s), along with an additional 500 from surrounding communities. Police said 25 people had been arrested for a range of offenses in what it described as "wholly unacceptable" violence.
## Kirk's Widow Vows to Advance Movement
Erika Kirk, the widow of [slain conservative advocate Charlie Kirk](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMV2QvaxJKFz8DV3-9krk4HXYi8GR2YPj7U_cK1w7I33SzMd9uHtOvDz_-5mcxDwstK-JRKgMX68xLyuVzQtvtL5LFlplzmUADfaiu4vBIXhOx4BVcJEIqKnImau93hAbsNXkPMTQmq57tPAgoyMG6024UbzhA0fjK3anpjuDRmsLWGPsOmsRmzBa8K1VqCmw5FJ_Zl5kopiOvFGpxzxXyU0i71U1_xT0Cvp93-uYv88VZ6-gH73QM5dDQT9TYH9Gky-J6fLi8qqKC--dU-K1vSrUz9lz-qXlT39sDn4CAAD__9pOddk), declared on Friday at Turning Point USA's headquarters that his mission will not end. In her[ first public statement](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0bHunDAMBvCnCZtPISTHZWC4qmK7bm1HFII53AsEJQbE21dU6hP8N0uf_JPs7_erezkKtLx_uBkbHmO34JEDMmPqto-PS8a0O6Yd85oiY-Y5pk5JZUBaKHU3OApnp4uhGREVVgU2ZW3qh9aVMsXUGKedsb53tbejdfLeS3Pv7cPW0qCxdUHNpUlb6lJKo_RNj9Yao3U1eKPc3QgtcSCO6fYn0sITjuGMO6abj3MRmol5zaJ6CtUK1R7HcZvzcmVCtbjAloVqc_SEfILfAm8JwS0DTJQ5plOodo3r_-TaSfRx8KH0gQED7ZgyzHGn5Q2cqN8YgSNMW-4vxU8uBUIgOCgEWHDHBAEZzrhdw9v5Ewa6YJfg-Sxf6efTiqqNngZRff92_R6P_AvTWqRmWC-G8r0WWr5nR-HflfylavZG_Q0AAP__4hunZw) since her husband's assassination on Wednesday at Utah Valley University, she said, _"They killed Charlie because he preached a message of patriotism, faith, and of God's merciful love. But they should all know this. If you thought that my husband's mission was powerful before, you have no idea. You have no idea what you just have unleashed across this entire country."_ Members of Turning Point USA, which has clubs on more than 850 college campuses, expressed their desire to [advance the movement](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGPozAQRn-N6RwZM05M4eIaulx7JXLsIZ6LwcgMRPn3K7bbeutPep_e-3cf754yLc-_fkbHUxkXfG8ZmbGO-yuUZcN6eKYDt7UWxo3nUkettJGqly2M0VP-jNBENyFq7Bp07c3cLECnTZOcBbRdtN3UWQy90mhDnIK3Ch6IurcNuZOm-hZapYyGC0x9bwxAF4PR_moEKIzEpV7-F1o44ZQ_5cB6CWVuskvM6ya6P0IPQg-cMFHO5yb0kMqMp5DQA8Y9eKayCD0Yo9oWlAzJ10woX1RfcmefZCg54xPlD3EZ_Lzum6y47o9MwS8nsKkurm_KmbbrTYB6zp6-fxv-VcjD6a8AAAD___q4ihw) and be more active than ever in honor of his memory. Supporters have rallied around Erika and her two young children, [raising $3 million](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGS4yAUBU-DMlSAQBIBwSbKvOmGKgwf668QuABL5dtPeWpuMBd4r7v_3dabxYjp8dceYFrIa4KrRmgNyvraXU4VymkbnlCfJTeo7chlFUwoyjTlcvUW43uVnTcBQMDQgeGTmmYpB6G6zYQ7zDOf7SBGHRx4N9055xrUpANTo-3QfNaY5pIzpoTsZdBaKSkH75SwoyKSgceWS_8_Y2obhPjOJ5Te5aOLZmvtWcnwh4iFiOW6rv4b6bAYe5f7107E8pEiYrGloYtAuWJ6GLUiYnGbLRGB7lh2Gmyq9MgJ3tTnZBvmVOmFAajbMPoCqd_aEbti_PPCGLGOE5Hs8fN1dO1XCU8jvgIAAP__TIKHSQ) in less than 48 hours on a Christian crowdfunding platform.
## List: Ranking the Most Expensive Small Towns
Nantucket was ranked the most expensive small town in the U.S., [according to Lending Tree](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO6yAURL8Gd0QYLnFcUDzpyV223dIi9iWwi8GCG3v99yvnF7Y9I83RzOd9vNsQQ3p-2AUNuTwm3GtEIizj63vKqWLZLIUN61oyYaUll1EKqbnoeQvjbEM8Rmhm4xAlqgZN2-nuBqCkbrxxve0lYKduDrSzsps66dQDnJ3AgtNNMGeb6FtohdASLuD6XmsANU9a2qtmIHAOlMvlK4dEHl088oblMuWlicYTrZWpf0wOTA7k0YcYz4zJwecFz0FMDloLKXrByWNFXhcbI6e8p8ptwZPyJVfi-LNiqmFDHtKbviqv9qg84c4rvebj9KiBHgUdU__92hQzr3uIMdRrx0A8Fxve_ob-dOhm5G8AAAD__9cZi_E). The survey looked at towns with populations ranging from 10,000 to 50,000 and calculated the median home value-to-income ratio of each town. The [average home in Nantucket costs $1,387,000](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD1uhDAQRk9jOpAxY1gKF2noNm1K5JgBJvEPsieQvX20yRHSfcWn96T3dp_vljzF7dUGNLymOeJVPDJjnr8-XYoF82mZTixHToyFQ8qzkkrXcqxbmBdL_jFDtZgVUWFXoWkHPdwAOqWr3VhQi3tH2d_aFbFfnQSwbpRqdWM_4FCRedLk2EIrpVbQwDqOWgN0i9PK9lqAxIU45eYjUeQdV_9IJ-bGpVB5szMfRXQvQk1CTdd1NR7jQnHjjPj8CDXtKaBQU0iZN7v9zcI1fh8YC51Yc7piqSnWNmAmZ4WaqmyW4yLvqfSDALkFS_7Xyf8KdRr1EwAA__8Ayn8k), with the average household income just below $120,000. The town has a population of just more than 14,000 residents. Vineyard Haven, Massachusetts; Jackson, Wyoming; Breckenridge, Colorado; and Hood River, Oregon, round out the top five.

**Whatever happened to Tonya Harding?** Tonya Harding was a top U.S. figure skater in the late 1980s and early 1990s, known for her athletic power. In 1991, she became the first American woman to land a triple axel in competition. But she's [most remembered for the 1994 scandal](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFuhDAQQNHTmG6RGY-XULhIQ7dpU6JZPIATg5E9AXH7aHOF9F-v-J-P4UEhhm3-oJWdTGnY-CyRRTgPP99j2grngyQcXPachIusKQ-gwd50d2tw8BTiNWDl3cQMbCp2TWvbN0QDtlocAD4Nja01VhOgB6OblvCJI9477EwV3EvTXYON1hawxqnrrEU0frRAd6tQsw-Scv2VwiYLT_FKB-d6TGsV3SKyF2XeFfQK-vM862dIc6Z9uV6Fgp5kiSxcFPSStotuC2UftrnKzu9niDGUe6tQzyuF-KfKv1YcDn4DAAD__4SJcxU) when her ex-husband, Jeff Gillooly, plotted an attack on her rival, Nancy Kerrigan, striking Kerrigan in the knee before the U.S. Championships. She avoided jail, but pleaded guilty to conspiracy to hinder prosecution, and at age 23 was banned for life from figure skating. She gave boxing a brief try and appeared occasionally on reality TV shows and celebrity specials. Today, she [lives a quieter life in the Pacific Northwest](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFu7CAUheHV4A4LLmA_CorXuJu0KS1kXw8kGEZwYzK7jyZbSH2kTzr_-229-Zhivr_5Ex0dZc3YW0IirOvX51Zyw3p5ihe2Ry2Ejc5SVxBguLBc6nX3MT1XPezuQARUAzo5m_mf1grMEBz4Y5OghEGFRkq082RxBjHZGY3e1BDdSxNWaimEAT3qw1pjtFb7ZsBPhmmBe6RSx48SMwU80rNcWMetnENygejRmPrPYGGw9N7Ho3zb18hgeb1hsFDJT8-Dr3vMd94DVuSx8RaQ59KH6vZHjynFNs1Mi_vpY_rV6U9JLgc_AQAA__8pTXXB) with her husband and son. The 2017 film _I, Tonya_ , starring Margot Robbie, portrayed her with more sympathy as a victim of poverty and abuse, as well as her own bad choices.

clean_body: More than 110,000 protesters on Saturday, carrying flags of England and Britain, in one of the biggest right-wing demonstrations of modern times in the U.K. | | | | | | Sunday, September 14, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1814, Francis Scott Key was still flying after the British bombardment of Fort McHenry and wrote The Defence of Fort M'Henry. The poem later became the lyrics to The Star-Spangled Banner , adopted as the national anthem in 1931. She made history as the first American woman to land a triple axel in competition, only to plummet from grace after being banned for life by the United States Figure Skating Association. Uncover what Tonya Harding has been up to since the notorious scandal that shattered her once bright future in . Today's sponsor, Prison Fellowship International, is working to break the cycle of poverty and stigma for children of incarcerated parents. With just $35, you can help provide school supplies, restore dignity, and give a child the chance to dream of a brighter future. | Conservative Protesters Pack London Streets More than 110,000 protesters on Saturday, carrying English and British flags, in one of the country's largest modern-day conservative demonstrations. A crowd from Big Ben to beyond Waterloo station rallied for free speech, British heritage and culture, and U.S. conservative advocate Charlie Kirk. The gathering was organized by Tommy Robinson's Unite the Kingdom. Protesters were kept apart from a nearby Stand Up to Racism counter-protest attended by about 5,000 people. More than , along with an additional 500 from surrounding communities. Police said 25 people had been arrested for a range of offenses in what it described as "wholly unacceptable" violence. Kirk's Widow Vows to Advance Movement Erika Kirk, the widow of , declared on Friday at Turning Point USA's headquarters that his mission will not end. In her since her husband's assassination on Wednesday at Utah Valley University, she said, "They killed Charlie because he preached a message of patriotism, faith, and of God's merciful love. But they should all know this. If you thought that my husband's mission was powerful before, you have no idea. You have no idea what you just have unleashed across this entire country." Members of Turning Point USA, which has clubs on more than 850 college campuses, expressed their desire to and be more active than ever in honor of his memory. Supporters have rallied around Erika and her two young children, in less than 48 hours on a Christian crowdfunding platform. List: Ranking the Most Expensive Small Towns Nantucket was ranked the most expensive small town in the U.S., . The survey looked at towns with populations ranging from 10,000 to 50,000 and calculated the median home value-to-income ratio of each town. The , with the average household income just below $120,000. The town has a population of just more than 14,000 residents. Vineyard Haven, Massachusetts; Jackson, Wyoming; Breckenridge, Colorado; and Hood River, Oregon, round out the top five. | Peter, I joined the Keith Edwards show to talk about the future of the Democratic Party. And I didn’t mince words with what we need to do. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T988aee08-2c49-4a62-9eb8-9d8c303af7c1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| Peter, Democrats around the country are rising up to finally give MAGA a taste of their own medicine. We’re seeing it in California, where Gavin Newsom is leading the fight against MAGA’s rigged map in Texas. And here in New York, I’m running for Congress because Democrats need to fight MAGA hard—and win. Democrats used to be the party of fighters, builders, and protectors. We fought fascism in World War II. We built the New Deal and Great Society. We protected civil rights and reproductive rights. But today, that party feels like a distant memory. The Democratic Party is dying, just when we most need a fierce opposition. [We can’t wait, Peter. It’s time for a change, which is why I’m running to be one of the first Gen Z’ers in Congress. If you want to help me win this race and destroy MAGA, split a donation between my campaign and Blue Amp Action today.](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5eba2b1-19d4-4a2c-b0c6-0e5fd135e6ee/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. name: Troy Downing
subject: The American Energy crisis ends with YOU, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
Peter, I’ve selected YOU to help me fight for America’s energy future.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Peter,
**_Picture this:_** hardworking Americans out of work, families crushed by soaring energy bills, and our nation relying more on foreign energy than ever before.
_That’s a future I refuse to accept._
I’m committed to putting America first by developing our energy resources, creating jobs, and ensuring families can afford to heat their homes and fuel their vehicles.
Energy independence isn’t just about dollars and cents. It’s about **_our security, our economy, and our freedom._**
The fight for American Energy independence is just getting started. Under a pro-America, pro-energy administration, we have a window of opportunity to act.
I’m on the front lines, fighting to fuel America without dependence on our adversaries.
[Peter, every dollar you contribute powers our campaign to secure American Energy, create jobs, and protect families from skyrocketing costs.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)[FUEL TROY’S FIGHT FOR ENERGY INDEPENDENCE
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)Every moment we wait puts America’s energy future at risk. Rush your support now to help keep America secure, affordable, and free.

Sincerely,
Troy Downing (MT-2)| |

# Sunday, September 14, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1919, [the first hospital in Corpus Christi](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGuqzAQRL_GdKC1MTYuXLyGLq-9JTLZTbDk4MhehfD3V_ALtzrSSHM0mp_bfAsxxe35P7zI8_eR5432moiZysz0DbUSVy7hQ6nQPRc8w1mBGlpwrdQzhpiOWTfoF0AnG_LSDnbU1ljVrN6iHo0zPS2Aw0MqZ9zS9xZNj3gHrZroTxk4qaUECbaTWoKTQ68GMNLAKDQQRs6l45WuSY905A-V7p5fTfIr87uK_p9Qk1DTvu8d1zXkLcWNulyeQk1Xq8VwtMtxQqiJNi4nR-Oa4vG9x5RiNVZoeL5CTJec_3bJx6vfAAAA___NAnSh), Spohn Hospital, was demolished by a hurricane, killing a nun, two patients, and two employees. A Texas family went viral this week after breaking a 108-year streak of having only boys in its family. See the incredible moment they found out [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0D2upDAMwPHThC6j2CR8FCm2oZttt0SBGIgUCEq8M8Ptn5grvNaWfvrb_57j04UYjvWv28nyZ0njQe8SiZnyyPRxpRAXzu5FMdOcsr-HIyo0UvUS9OhdiNeoK28n5XuoyEJr2k63TYvVZg0sxqMG72aPNSqHpjaz16Yzc90vugr2xlQPGkCBah-gQfVgajSqgUZ1QivygVN-8EbfpCVe6UX5Mae9inZjPouo_wgcBA7HdabC90rgcMsCB9ULHAAEDv-LvO8TOHwhWTbKuzvk4vYQL0mfk2YOxyqXkAvLyU2XXEOOckr5kOGQoDp5kcs3UWXrz3eIMZSmFVqtuwvxG8W_e-XL4k8AAAD__zC_hs0) and read more in _Et Cetera_. This edition is sponsored by [Oricle, a trusted partner making better hearing possible for thousands of families](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1rwzAQhn-NvNnoy7I1aAgEQ4e0S6HdxNk6JwLFCpIcJ_--xN26dnvvueN4eL9O9gQ--OX8Dlc05TFHu-CWA5aCyRZ8QM5Ycklwx5Bwism9oOWUtzXVNZPWgQ9PKytnRuo0q9Cwru162amOVxejOXDXClACRi2RUjcC6KnvR5gQmKq8eT2jmknGKKNdwySjmrWCt1QxRXsiKTpfYmrKBXelOTzjHVMzxWsVzKWUWybiQPhA-LBtW3PGEpOfAr4uCB9yiQlzPa_JxzXXOBMxWJxtSbBkmIqPi_WOiCPhKu6BMU24WvesZfeHwzzvExeCcJXXkRFx_PwePghXh-Ht-LuqknG3zYfgs-qIpOcr-LA7l_81fTf8JwAA___CUY35). Sometimes the best stories aren't crafted in marketing meetings--they unfold around the dinner table. Recently, our founder gifted his dad, "Grandpa Jim," a pair of Oricle hearing aids. What happened next had the whole family laughing, tearing up, and realizing just how powerful clear hearing can be.

## Gov. Abbott Signs Bill Banning Sharia Compounds
Gov. Greg Abbott [signed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGSrCAQRb9GMyxgECUgeInZvHRDq4UepQrBgl5n5u-3xv2ETbtvnTr3ft3nO4QY0vofdrT0euQ54bNGJMIyE76gVqRKBU6MBV0u_nOcJZc944YJNXsI8T2r1tuFeyNatGLoh1ENepDtZhen0ahlMDA-nHZuAaVhvJlR4zgaqdtgPzBuhBKCCz50QgluRH-TPddC87FRHH2gXDra8FJ6xHc-sXQu7220G9FRm9u_Rk6NnNZ8dleoW_PZyOlTp5HTkSv9frGkXBgsSyZiNaypsghPtkBKIa2sblACMJf3I38nX1lI7OK1xfrjGWIMVQ-N4usOIV4K9LfhTit_AgAA__-d4oSw) House Bill 4211 into law on Friday, banning residential property developments like EPIC City that create Sharia compounds in the state, or that defraud and discriminate against Texans. House Bill 4211, authored by Rep. Candy Noble of Collin County, was written after members of the East Plano Islamic Center [formed](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOhCAYhJ8GOwywKFpQXGO3115pEH5d7n7FwH_r-vYX9xWummQmmXwzX_fx7iLGbfl0K1h6zWnc4CgIRJBHgpcrBahQdk_ADD7lcJmjEqrhoudSj8FFPEddBTuJ0MsKrDSN6bRpjaoeNgTjZKOcF-D7Gaam1aKDtlNdP4cgVRXtVSZ6qaUUUphaail62dxUI1rZio5pASFSyjU94I0045mekGuf1grtg2gv7PbB1MDUcBxHvU0-zMcVMzVce5gaMHmHTA1umhIRL3HZCp8iIndxhcAd8QmT_4nbwmGPnvtIJ99z-gZPPG7cJ8S3_G50MjXcemk6Y5gaqmzDfkTEWFrDtFhWF_ENR_-79GnVXwAAAP__l6SLzQ) a for-profit entity called Community Capital Partners to develop a sprawling Muslim-centric community just outside Josephine, called EPIC City. House Bill 4211 bans land deals based on religion, restricts resale control by sellers, and mandates disputes be resolved under Texas law in state courts. The bill passed the House by a vote of 104-41, and the Senate by a vote of 30-1 before being signed into law. You can read the full bill text [here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAURb8Gb7HewxjMwNAosjokHdqho0XMs41KggXUSf6-Sn6h69XRvVfn-zScrA_-On_YC5lyn-JwpVsOVAqlodDd5kwll2Q3ConGmNwzHDjwdgd6h2Jw1ofHICpnzuA0VmRQtaoTSipeLYY3rVLgOjF2HY101tqdncRukjCBFKLy5lkGGgUiIKgaBYLGtuEtSJTQMQHkfImpLgu9Lk3hETdK9RgvVTBLKWtmzRvjPeP9aFdfYqhfYD3HjfF-70M4xvjzuzLeLz6XmB61zeudNf2R5i_KmTWHTn8yLp8saw7ve8ERq2TcevMh-CwVEzBfrA-v2fI_WZvhfwEAAP__s8x8hQ).
## 'Borderlands 4' Debuts in Dallas
Frisco-based [Gearbox Software debuted _Borderlands 4_ in Dallas](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLvOozAQhZ_GdKCZwRdcuNiG7t92S2TwOLHkhMi2IHn7FXmFvz06Opfv38_y41NOz9tf_2DX3nFfnnzWzK1xWRq_fa3caiv-4Fx420u4xIWAVA-2R7kEn_JnkV1wKwSLHTs0ykzSaEPd3UVgkKDMpIm0QTOyJSVH2EhLZSx2yV1hYFEiAoIZUCJYVCMp0KhhEhI4pLaXod35Oynmz35wGbb90WV3b-1VxfhH0CxoPs9zCD5nX68jl0XQzAc_m6A5-G2bDI09ruz7yUjVxw19D9MabFyjjeMoaO6KC68z5ZyqNkLC7eFT_ra13zE6HP0PAAD__2xHduk) this week, unveiling the long-awaited installment of the blockbuster franchise after six years in development with a red-carpet premiere. Founded in Plano in 1999 and relocated to Frisco in 2015, Gearbox grew from five employees to hundreds, driven by the _Borderlands_ franchise's success and _Borderlands 2 's_ top-50 all-time ranking. _Borderlands 4_ is [expected to push the franchise past 100 million](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO5CAQRL8GZ4ygjY0JCC5xtpdeaLWhPUbCeAW945m_P838wqZVUtXT-_e1fGHKqdz_4kGen9u5FLpaJmaqC9MTWyNuXPFBuVI4a3yHCygYpHJSmyViyq_FdNGvKjrdkdd2sJOxo4Vu9xgirpEgrCsgbcpat5mIVqMjBDBd8u8x5bTRWmllb9po5fTQw6BGPapJGEUx8VlvvNMHacuv80H1Fs6jy35n_m6i_yNgFjBf13W7NsR3KWDGyilkEjBTYaqMqRxUWMC8njVSzVhik0Zm_Clhl-WsvMvPibzjkcpdphJ_GteXgBkmK0cbI6gBZK-ckQZhlGswTsLY92sIdrKT7qqP31fKObXRCqPuB6b8oeXfOX54-B8AAP__AVCPzw) copies sold, with the first three installments already reaching 94 million sales in the popular "looter shooter" series.
## Texas Tourism Soars Past Competing States
Texas led the nation [in tourism spending in 2024](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkbGSozAMhp8GOmVsx8CmoLiGbq-9klGwCLoYe0dWYHn7G7KPcJ1G80nz_dKfz_ETOXJ6_MaVev2e85hoL5FUSUalbyyFtKjgRlFoyhLO5uiMa8DcwPoxIMdj9HXo7ybcbE297Zruw3dt5-qlp6YNk_Xou8beyV1nxKabOx9uEwbbtDX35zJzs95aY013sd6am22urjGtbc1H5Q0F1iwXXeitNMcjbySXKa917BfVr1Jdf1VuqNyw7_vlRxdT0PySPUsMJ1q54cxWuQFFeYpUuUEpJSqFCP5mTgVSFl1gQsmRE8LG8uDECBNGnrOc5dsAEu1wZHkCpgArciLgBOV5SJ6epJwe8HMuOB24rHDPeT2ZV4GIReEgFKCN5NDlxI_8gkR0DsAz5b1yQy19-No5Ri5tV3nzWJHjO7X-36-23v0LAAD__64esN0), with $36.7 billion, surpassing traditional destinations such as New York and California, according to a new Travel and Tour World report. The state saw a 3.1% increase in tourism economic output from the previous year, and also ranked higher than Virginia, North Carolina, and Tennessee. The report also touched on aspects of the Texas economy that led to the increase in spending, like musical festivals, cultural attractions, outdoor sightseeing, and more. [You can read the full report here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE8DGcjd-AcCB5uQzaYbIg9uBksGI7t3GG7_NFzhZaVS6atS_XtMDxdi2F9_3UaWP0uadjpLJGbKE9PHlUJcOLs3xUxzyv5rTihQNWJoQE7ehXhNsvb2KfwANVkwyvTSaIP1atFp5RF6AzCbpTN953utvSfTo0Ql62C_MDGABBAgTAsSxACqQyU0aNFXUpAPnHLLK92TlnilN-V2Tlsd7cp8lKr7U-FY4XieZ7tdxe1u57SH9A1VOMawUOErUoWjyxzmW920htP_HMrWPFPaGgQhpVS6PdajztYfZ4gxFG0qKV6bC_Fu5d999bb4EwAA__9-b317).

For years, Jim had struggled to keep up with conversations--missing jokes, nodding along, and quietly withdrawing. But the moment he put them on, everything changed. Suddenly, voices were crisp, laughter rang out, and Jim was back in the middle of it all.
At one point, he even asked the family to "quiet down" because things were suddenly _too clear._ That moment stuck with us. For Jim, it wasn't just about hearing better--it was about feeling present again. He loved them so much, he immediately asked for an extra pair, just in case.
[Stories like this are why we're proud to partner with Oricle.](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD1rwzAQhn-NvNnoy7I1aAgEQ4e0S6HdxNk6JwLFCpIcJ_--xN26dnvvueN4eL9O9gQ--OX8Dlc05TFHu-CWA5aCyRZ8QM5Ycklwx5Bwism9oOWUtzXVNZPWgQ9PKytnRuo0q9Cwru162amOVxejOXDXClACRi2RUjcC6KnvR5gQmKq8eT2jmknGKKNdwySjmrWCt1QxRXsiKTpfYmrKBXelOTzjHVMzxWsVzKWUWybiQPhA-LBtW3PGEpOfAr4uCB9yiQlzPa_JxzXXOBMxWJxtSbBkmIqPi_WOiCPhKu6BMU24WvesZfeHwzzvExeCcJXXkRFx_PwePghXh-Ht-LuqknG3zYfgs-qIpOcr-LA7l_81fTf8JwAA___CUY35) If you or someone you love has been waiting to take the step toward better hearing, now's the time. name: Dominic Rapini
subject: Charlie Kirk: His Legacy Has Been Borne
body:
Shame on Liberals and their evil rhetoric

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=4122f2bd82)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “The tyrant dies and his rule is over; the martyr dies and his rule begins.”— Søren Kierkegaard

---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
|
---
|
---
| |
# Opinion: Charlie Kirk
# – A Legacy Is Borne

---
| |
By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator

My fellow Americans, we gather at a moment of sorrow. A good man has been taken from us. Charlie Kirk is gone. But though his life has ended, his cause has only begun.
**Charlie Kirk was not the caricature his enemies painted.** He was not a fascist, not a divider, not a man of hate. He was the opposite. He stood for faith. He stood for freedom. He stood for America.
**He welcomed debate. He invited disagreement.** He turned division into dialogue and opposition into common ground. That is why he was feared. That is why he was killed.
_**He was killed because he spoke of God.**_
_**He was killed because he defended life.**_
_**He was killed because he told the truth about family, about freedom, about America.**_
Those who feared him thought they could end him. But they were wrong. They have not silenced him. They have made his voice eternal.
And what followed his death revealed much about the times in which we live. When dignity demanded silence, many mocked. **When respect demanded reverence, many jeered.**
**Rep. Ilhan Omar** mocked him still, saying, “These people are full of s—.”
**Matthew Dowd of MSNBC** sneered, “He’s been one of the most divisive... constantly pushing hate speech.”
When Speaker Mike Johnson called for a moment of silence, **liberal lawmakers booed.**
This is their compassion. This is their charity. This is their respect for human life.
**Contrast this with President Trump’s words at the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg —** a woman who opposed him at every turn: “She was an amazing woman who led an amazing life.” That is dignity. That is America.
And so, let us not descend to the level of those who mocked. Let us not repay hatred with hatred.**For when conservatives mourn, we do not burn cities. We do not spit on police. We do not riot in the streets. We bow our heads. We pray. We remember.**
**But we must ask: where does this hatred come from?**
For years I have studied this question. Why are liberals so profane in their declarations? Why so quick to call their opponents fascist, racist, evil? Why such rage over politics?
The answer is this:**they are a movement without faith.** They have no belief in God. They have no compass higher than themselves. Over ninety percent of atheists in America identify as liberals or Democrats. And without faith, there is a hole in the heart — a void, a vacuum.
**Where faith should dwell, ideology takes its place. Where God should reign, politics becomes their altar.** When conservatives challenge their beliefs, they feel it as blasphemy, as an attack on the only thing they worship: their ideology.
That is why they hate. That is why they mock. That is why, in the wake of Charlie Kirk’s murder, they did not grieve, but sneered.
But **conservatives are different**. Our foundation is not rage. Our foundation is not ideology. Our foundation is faith. Our foundation is family. Our foundation is America.
And so, let us be clear: the e**nemies of truth may kill the man, but they cannot kill the mission.** They may strike down one leader, but they cannot stop the millions who rise in his place.
Charlie Kirk’s flame has been taken from this world. But his flame has lit a thousand others.
**He is gone from us now. But his legacy has just been born.**

_**God bless his family.**_
_**God bless his memory.**_
_**And God bless the United States of America.**_

clean_body: Shame on Liberals and their evil rhetoric | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “The tyrant dies and his rule is over; the martyr dies and his rule begins.”— Søren Kierkegaard | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Opinion: Charlie Kirk – A Legacy Is Borne | | By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator My fellow Americans, we gather at a moment of sorrow. A good man has been taken from us. Charlie Kirk is gone. But though his life has ended, his cause has only begun. Charlie Kirk was not the caricature his enemies painted. He was not a fascist, not a divider, not a man of hate. He was the opposite. He stood for faith. He stood for freedom. He stood for America. He welcomed debate. He invited disagreement. He turned division into dialogue and opposition into common ground. That is why he was feared. That is why he was killed. He was killed because he spoke of God. He was killed because he defended life. He was killed because he told the truth about family, about freedom, about America. Those who feared him thought they could end him. But they were wrong. They have not silenced him. They have made his voice eternal. And what followed his death revealed much about the times in which we live. When dignity demanded silence, many mocked. When respect demanded reverence, many jeered. Rep. Ilhan Omar mocked him still, saying, “These people are full of s—.” Matthew Dowd of MSNBC sneered, “He’s been one of the most divisive... constantly pushing hate speech.” When Speaker Mike Johnson called for a moment of silence, liberal lawmakers booed. This is their compassion. This is their charity. This is their respect for human life. Contrast this with President Trump’s words at the passing of Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg — a woman who opposed him at every turn: “She was an amazing woman who led an amazing life.” That is dignity. That is America. And so, let us not descend to the level of those who mocked. Let us not repay hatred with hatred.For when conservatives mourn, we do not burn cities. We do not spit on police. We do not riot in the streets. We bow our heads. We pray. We remember. But we must ask: where does this hatred come from? For years I have studied this question. Why are liberals so profane in their declarations? Why so quick to call their opponents fascist, racist, evil? Why such rage over politics? The answer is this:they are a movement without faith. They have no belief in God. They have no compass higher than themselves. Over ninety percent of atheists in America identify as liberals or Democrats. And without faith, there is a hole in the heart — a void, a vacuum. Where faith should dwell, ideology takes its place. Where God should reign, politics becomes their altar. When conservatives challenge their beliefs, they feel it as blasphemy, as an attack on the only thing they worship: their ideology. That is why they hate. That is why they mock. That is why, in the wake of Charlie Kirk’s murder, they did not grieve, but sneered. But conservatives are different. Our foundation is not rage. Our foundation is not ideology. Our foundation is faith. Our foundation is family. Our foundation is America. And so, let us be clear: the enemies of truth may kill the man, but they cannot kill the mission. They may strike down one leader, but they cannot stop the millions who rise in his place. Charlie Kirk’s flame has been taken from this world. But his flame has lit a thousand others. He is gone from us now. But his legacy has just been born. God bless his family. God bless his memory. And God bless the United States of America. | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Dominic For CT.
