subject: Now’s the moment to show what our movement is made of:
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250914-1518-foote&t=1001&akid=1518%2E342411%2EnUuUYc ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

The fight for our democracy and our future is on the line — and we need
your help. We’re coming to you to ask if you can [ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250914-movement.YtLEgb&refcode=em20250914-1518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1518%2E342411%2EnUuUYc ]chip in a
$3 donation to the Squad Victory Fund today.

$3 to stand up to Trump’s authoritarian playbook, MAGA’s
hateful attacks, and anyone trying to tear our country apart.

$3 to take on the billionaire-backed corporations that put
profits over people every single day.

$3 to back our progressive champions in Congress who fight
unapologetically for working families and justice.

$3 may not match the millions raised by Republican
mega-donors, but together, every grassroots donation adds up to real
power.

This movement doesn’t answer to CEOs or corporate PACs — we answer to you.
And with your support, we’re growing unstoppable, people-powered momentum
from the ground up.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250914-movement.YtLEgb&refcode=em20250914-1518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1518%2E342411%2EnUuUYc ]Will you chip in $3 today and help fuel this fight for
bold, progressive change? Now’s the moment to show what our movement is
made of.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250914-movement.YtLEgb&refcode=em20250914-1518&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1518%2E342411%2EnUuUYc ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1518%2E342411%2EnUuUYc

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: John Fetterman
subject: before it’s too late (Social Security)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
Derek – working folks in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security _every_. _single_. _paycheck_. You earned it. It’s yours.
**Now it’s under attack.**

Before we explain what's happening, [**will you pitch in just $5 to help us hit our $20,000 mid-month goal and keep up the fight to stop these ruthless attacks?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=1&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)
Trump is tearing apart the Social Security Administration – closing offices and cutting staff. The plan is simple: Frustrate people, shake their faith in the system, and then push privatization as the so-called “fix.”
**But privatization isn’t a fix – it’s a handoff to Wall Street.** Your guaranteed retirement becomes money for big banks and hedge funds to gamble with. With every market swing, your future is on the line.
**The plan is already in motion.** Trump’s Treasury secretary bragged about the “back door” to privatization buried in the Terrible Budget Bill. **That’s why we need to act now.**
John’s in this fight to protect Social Security – calling out Trump’s scheme and making sure people see what’s happening before it’s too late. But keeping the pressure up takes resources, and he needs to know you're with him.
**[Our mid-month fundraising deadline hits tomorrow at midnight. Will you chip in $5, $25, $50 – or whatever you can swing – to stand with John and help him shine a spotlight on Trump’s scheme before it’s too late?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=2&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51662?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=3&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)
---
| | [DONATE $25 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51663?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=4&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)
---
| | [DONATE $50 NOW](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51664?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=5&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)
---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51661?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=6&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)
---
Thanks, Derek.
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-2025?refcode=jtk238-fr-fl-footer&t=7&refcode2=10308_434096_112B05&akid=10308%2E434096%2E112B05)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: Re: They’re trying to censure me for speaking out for Palestine
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
This new censure resolution is an attempt to silence me and our movement for peace. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWjtFTjSjIG457ru2j9I-rbpIaFLb8FhN9EaBVM4MU7qLs5i3y3pF7xIxdnGLW4Fo-fW456a8j5KY7AXxgR5yBLYUaxkK1-L6vpVqtKEGnEzPU46bvW5-afQRZpK5IF12EmYNMlmZxIpPh0puNrlPePmngvA8SVHj_CF8BK2PlJaptdH45UxrhKX4XvsipSnwB987goX1VtiyC23BgyXZy2CN1LZsQVxvAkAE--vU2-Ms/4jw/_JANRbr9RgaBAfOAW3ReTw/h0/h001.bze5U3McmVoL5pQHtgn5VPaDHcdaJHQn9WmU0ZK21hk)
---
Friend, Republicans are targeting me for speaking out for Palestinian rights and liberation. They’ve introduced a censure resolution against me, calling my speech for our shared humanity “vile” and saying that it is “beneath that of a civilized person.” **They police my words when I speak out about how they’re enabling genocide and forced starvation—while they simultaneously vote for a nearly $1 trillion military budget that many of them will personally profit from.** **Even as Republicans keep introducing resolutions to censure me, I won’t stay silent. I won’t back down in the fight for freedom for all.** I will continue pushing back against state violence and pushing for a government that actually represents the people―who are overwhelmingly demanding an end to genocide. They can’t censure us all. [**Please, donate now to stand with me against racist attacks and the threat of censure. Together, we’ll keep demanding liberation for all people.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqva5xURJUBsgLQSXSHOrodfsJEMWN8ifQ641UqG2ZrJVD3LrOzpIY_W5iuj54hDdJ_uN1jlJIUgJr_QarD_MsDXBCWUp5_Z2KfzB9WUnm_bMS4nm3rjl_TyG6K23ctJBDetqbNKwisWIp41y_TrrHIUUqLOgaC82A6uSL0n7xpGHpdt3kaVELsdFWJREhyPYFRxsBuGEUWzMACOP0grJwtiS1Ih4pQ5IZvunCxiPaCI6omA0m0H_ETKGjjRubOqxQNwxNIJLZwcWupTpgLXHCITdKJNfCqWj8VgMnbkb0uOKMEwpy1oz0RNrl9pnNb1wK8G7RkjSGCiJRUkL0lsAwy4sQASsdIea2eNBimYm9GqZSitNfvHJX-1w-Y1C0BHb_7JinH2EemmuRCMNlewdJhI/4jw/_JANRbr9RgaBAfOAW3ReTw/h1/h001.KsuK83Pa6fQD59OwfYmP1YzBoi3xWeuZxf4LRy4i9eM) | [DONATE NOW](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqva5xURJUBsgLQSXSHOrodfsJEMWN8ifQ641UqG2ZrJVH3ZFbw106gfMwg2irQKa9v5uWyJBAvjrRouvfEnUKgl-fkUvv6mg86UU4PtN6nWWMOcgBRRRKP7ENTDbD4eYRD4Ecsm0ManNOY_r0Cfc4JgWC0QXhT_N05WXEbqNVHt89W6Oj1CoR6rjpy_N4KrRToqS9aNFSPbcPd9KO_6QIHVoC_aajmtnc4CtY9jRC2pTcc7ZArXP8GbJPZ9IrJvcZj8cI_KWdvw8q2vLLL0Z0QqKBPnsXp5Ll_PMBiuazQkAhax-OyAU_yA5_uWzuOCaTZNgK16Ecs6tR4NHiw9_JEE_xcHhbQiDXGnyVsjxtk7qfEyJNBF4wyCCUlQoG3wPKy1IkqPLQ7B40RSfhWy1O3o/4jw/_JANRbr9RgaBAfOAW3ReTw/h2/h001.sPfk7yXxbJ3OpbN6bmxjoprZ7BpTPeyNmVsbr-XuhJs)
---
As my colleagues hand even more power and taxpayer dollars to our authoritarian president, Trump is preparing to send U.S. troops into Black-led cities like Memphis and New Orleans (which is also a majority-Black city).
The nearly $1 trillion military budget passed by the House last week—which will likely get a vote in the Senate this week—will go toward militarizing our cities and killing people abroad.
They’ve already sent $150 billion to the Pentagon, which is being used for illegal ICE raids and detention camps. Now they want to send another nearly $900 billion of our tax dollars toward death and destruction, instead of investing in what our communities need to survive and thrive.
**Dissent is critical in a democracy and we will continue speaking out against our government’s harms. We will not let them silence us.**

clean_body: This new censure resolution is an attempt to silence me and our movement for peace. | | | Friend, Republicans are targeting me for speaking out for Palestinian rights and liberation. They’ve introduced a censure resolution against me, calling my speech for our shared humanity “vile” and saying that it is “beneath that of a civilized person.” They police my words when I speak out about how they’re enabling genocide and forced starvation—while they simultaneously vote for a nearly $1 trillion military budget that many of them will personally profit from. Even as Republicans keep introducing resolutions to censure me, I won’t stay silent. I won’t back down in the fight for freedom for all. I will continue pushing back against state violence and pushing for a government that actually represents the people―who are overwhelmingly demanding an end to genocide. They can’t censure us all. | As my colleagues hand even more power and taxpayer dollars to our authoritarian president, Trump is preparing to send U.S. troops into Black-led cities like Memphis and New Orleans (which is also a majority-Black city). The nearly $1 trillion military budget passed by the House last week—which will likely get a vote in the Senate this week—will go toward militarizing our cities and killing people abroad. They’ve already sent $150 billion to the Pentagon, which is being used for illegal ICE raids and detention camps. Now they want to send another nearly $900 billion of our tax dollars toward death and destruction, instead of investing in what our communities need to survive and thrive. Dissent is critical in a democracy and we will continue speaking out against our government’s harms. We will not let them silence us. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you for always being by my side, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Sat, Sep 13, 2025 Subject: They’re trying to censure me for speaking out for Palestine To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, I’m being targeted for speaking up against the genocide of my people in Palestine. As the only Palestinian American in Congress, I’m a daily reminder to my colleagues that Palestinians are human beings who deserve to live and grow up and experience freedom and safety. Because I’ve called out my fellow colleagues for their willingness to fund genocide and war crimes, a censure resolution has been introduced against me. My Republican colleagues don’t see Palestinians, Black people, or other marginalized folks as full humans whose lives matter. Let’s show them that we belong in the halls of power, and we won’t let them silence us or stop our efforts to save lives. Whether through censure resolutions in Congress or troops in our streets, they are trying to silence dissent. But our movement is growing. More Democrats in Congress are swearing off AIPAC funding, and more are supporting policies to restrict U.S. military aid to Israel’s government. At the same time, a new Quinnipiac poll shows that 60% of all U.S. voters oppose sending more military aid to Israel, and half of all voters say Israel is committing genocide against Palestinians in Gaza—with much higher numbers among Democratic voters.1 I will keep pushing our government to represent the American people and stop the Israeli government’s genocide on Palestinians. I will keep demanding dignity and safety for marginalized people and defending human rights at home and abroad. I will continue defending our constitutional rights, including our due process rights and our right to protest against genocide―whether on college campuses, in the streets, or in the halls of Congress. Republicans can target me for my speech. But I know I have you and millions of people across the country and the world by my side. Let’s show them that together, we won’t stop speaking truth to power. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | Thank you so much. We aren’t going anywhere! In love and solidarity, Rashida 1\. * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . Peter, I’m proud to be one of the lawyers leading the fight in the Democrats’ lawsuit against Donald Trump to defend democracy and protect voting rights.
I only reach out when it’s important, so believe me when I tell you: this is as important as it gets.
[Hakeem Jeffries filed a lawsuit to block Trump’s attempt to undermine our elections – _and he needs your grassroots support to help us win._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115205086/569533950/1662333048?amount=15&refcode=20250914_em_fr_b1_jeffries_sur_main_v1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MzM0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZmYzNDUyMC03ZjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1EM4srbEiqFPpVvn4TIu-Pi5irTmcnDy-l3iVtWZCDw=)
[_The truth is: Winning a case like this won’t be easy, especially when we’re facing a corrupt administration backed by billionaires. name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: Would you be angry if this happened to you?Sender:
body:
| | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom.
---
| | Dear Friend,I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person.We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me.

clean_body: | | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom. | | Dear Friend,I’m so sad and angry right now. After over a decade of service to his country, my police officer husband is facing politically motivated prosecution while saving the life of an innocent person.We’ve been so strong and hopeful but tonight, this little device on my husband’s ankle broke me. I'm sorry for getting ahead of myself, but it’s been so hard, and I don’t know what else to do as a Soros-backed prosecutor is persecuting my husband for saving the life of a fellow officer. It all started when Brad and his partner, Officer Arbogast, responded to a shoplifting call. The suspect’s resistance quickly turned into a violent attack on the officers – putting Brad’s partner's life at risk.Brad did the only thing a good officer could do and shot the violent criminal.It's episodes like this that make me worried to death when Brad is late coming home. I cried myself sick when I heard what happened that day, but I was so thankful they were alive.And yet I know the danger our families and communities would be in if Brad and other good officers weren't willing to risk their lives.That’s why I was completely shocked when we heard Brad was being charged with murder! But then we found out the prosecutor was New Mexico’s radical Soros-backed Attorney General Raul Torrez, who used to work in the Obama administration.This isn’t about justice – this is a political attack. Friend, it only got worse from there.In February, Brad was wrongly convicted at a circus trial. Not only were two jurors removed and replaced without reason, but one of the jurors they kept was a radical BLM activist who hid their bias during jury selection!Honestly, I don’t know how we would’ve faced the attacks from the anti-cop mob if it wasn’t for Jason Johnson at the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). When LELDF heard about Brad’s fight for justice, they reached out and offered to help fund his legal defense.I thank God every day for bringing us hope in such a dark time.But friend, LELDF is a non-profit organization so the only way they can help good officers under attack, like Brad, is through the support of patriots like you. Right now, Brad must wait, shackled to an ankle monitor, until the judge decides on September 19th if he gets a chance at a fair trial...which would be another hefty sum. Don’t get me wrong, I’m so grateful Brad is home and no longer sitting in prison, but dealing with his ankle monitor has been tough; the kids begging Dad to go swimming with them, the awkward stares in public, seeing him struggle with it to work out or do other activities... The other day, Brad walked to the back of our property to make sure one of the dog's bowls had water and to fill up the hummingbird feeders...then he gets a call from SCRAM, the people that monitor his ankle monitor, saying he is out of boundaries.OUR. OWN. PROPERTY?!?It really got to him and seeing him upset breaks my heart. All of the crap he has gone through, that our family has gone through, and will continue to deal with for who knows how long...All because one lowlife criminal chose to put two officers in danger.Because one corrupt politician decided he needed political gain.I can’t let them ruin our lives...but I know I can’t win this for him on my own. Thank you from the bottom of our hearts for all of the love and support. You all have no idea how much it means to us.Thank you, thank you, thank you!Lacy Lunsford P.S. My husband, Officer Brad Lunsford, is waiting for a judge to grant him a new trial after a BLM activist infiltrated the jury at his trial in February. This political prosecution from a Soros-backed Attorney General has been a heavy burden on our family. Thank you for your prayers and financial support! | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303 |

name: Team Schiff
subject: Anything?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8974%2E5257348%2E45Z2bp)
Derek,
**[Is there anything we can say to get you to chip in? Adam has an end-of-quarter deadline coming up soon, and he’s counting on you.](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=q32025_abs_em.sQXYU5&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8974%2E5257348%2E45Z2bp)**
We’re hoping you’ll help us out.
So here it is, plain and simple:
What if we told you Trump's allies are dismantling critical federal institutions and turning the White House into a piggy bank?
What if we reminded you that Congressional Republicans pushed through a brutal bill with major cuts to health care, food assistance, and renewable energy — just so billionaires could walk away with even bigger tax breaks?
Or what if we mentioned that the government very well could shut down at the end of this month — all at the hands of a Republican congressional majority and White House unwilling to seek compromise to keep vital government services open?
**What if we told you that Adam Schiff is leading the charge to stop them and using every tool he can to defend our democracy and our country?**

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: Here’s what I had to say about our healthcare system:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
Hi there,
At a recent forum hosted by Fems for Dems in Michigan, someone asked what I think is the best strategy to address private insurers and their increasing stranglehold on our healthcare system. Here's what I had to say:
_There’s an element of corruption in the system, where corporate executives can buy up hospitals, silence doctors, and then turn life and death decisions into profit margins._
**As governor, I will confront this head-on.** I’ll work to pass transparency laws that will ensure that everyone knows exactly who owns what and that we all have access to information about the financial decisions that impact the care we all receive.
We need to protect independent providers and non-profit health centers to make sure every community can access quality health care.
**Because I believe that access to health care is a human right — a right that requires all of us in government to stand with the people and ensure access is people-driven and not a business decision.**
**[If you agree with me, then support my campaign for governor by donating $10 or whatever you can now. Together, we can improve our healthcare system and protect Michiganders’ access to high-quality, affordable care.](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&amount=10&t=2&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
| [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=3&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
[CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=25&t=4&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
| [CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=50&t=5&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
[CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=100&t=6&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
| [CHIP IN $250 NOW](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/604?c0=jmb-em-q32025.bgb7Yo&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=250&t=7&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q32025.A5XsW4&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250914_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=8&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)
---
If you put me in office, I will fight every day to take our healthcare system out of corporate control and put it where it belongs: in the hands of patients, the providers, and the people of Michigan.
Thank you,
Jocelyn

* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=9&akid=704%2E181023%2EtyKV8a)

PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR

Ferndale, MI 48220

name: JanePAC
subject: $1 to fight Trump’s fossil fuel agenda
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Every dollar fuels our fight through Election Day.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115206298/569536833/1328794144?refcode=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzcyYzUxLTgzOTEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wumiaDeCc38tn2vYiaENwD_2KRT0eTuLXU6E0sBu_0w=&emci=077f00f5-468f-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=4823105)
---
In just 51 days, critical elections in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and beyond will decide whether we elect climate leaders who will stand up to Trump and his dirty fossil fuel agenda — or oily politicians who will put profit over people. **[That’s why we’re asking our grassroots supporters to give just $1 before our mid-September deadline tomorrow. If that’s all you need to hear, can we count on your support to power our climate champions across the finish line?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115206301/569536836/2105508926?amount=1&refcode=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzcyYzUxLTgzOTEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wumiaDeCc38tn2vYiaENwD_2KRT0eTuLXU6E0sBu_0w=)** | [**DONATE $1**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115206302/569536837/2105508926?amount=1&refcode=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzcyYzUxLTgzOTEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wumiaDeCc38tn2vYiaENwD_2KRT0eTuLXU6E0sBu_0w=)
---
[**CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115206303/569536838/2105508926?refcode=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzcyYzUxLTgzOTEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wumiaDeCc38tn2vYiaENwD_2KRT0eTuLXU6E0sBu_0w=)
---
You may be wondering how a donation of just $1 could make a difference, but here’s why your support today could determine whether we win or lose in November:
* Every single seat in the **Virginia House of Delegates** is on the ballot. Republicans need just **two flips** to take control, and our opponents are spending over six figures in digital attack ads against one of our endorsed climate champions to make it happen.

* The **race for Attorney General in Virginia** is another high-stakes battle. Dominion Energy has dumped over $600,000 into re-electing their ally Jason Miyares and keeping our endorsed candidate, Jay Jones, out of office. They know Jay won’t hesitate to challenge corporate polluters and lead Virginia’s legal fight against Trump’s fossil fuel agenda.

* In **Pennsylvania, Georgia, and more,** our endorsed climate champions — from the Luzerne County Council to Georgia’s Public Service Commission — are in must-win fights that will determine whether communities get leaders brave enough to take on corporate polluters or politicians in Big Oil’s pocket.

We don’t want to look back 51 days from now and wish we’d done more to support our climate champions when we had the time, which is why we’re turning to you for help.
**[Our records show you haven’t made an online donation to the Jane Fonda Climate PAC this year. This is your chance to jump in when it matters most. Will you give just $1 today to help us hit our $15,000 fundraising goal and power our incredible climate champions to victory?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/115206305/569536840/2105508926?amount=1&refcode=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.0e372c51-8391-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBlMzcyYzUxLTgzOTEtZjAxMS1iNDg0LTYwNDViZGViNzQxMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=wumiaDeCc38tn2vYiaENwD_2KRT0eTuLXU6E0sBu_0w=)**

clean_body: Every dollar fuels our fight through Election Day. | In just 51 days, critical elections in Virginia, Pennsylvania, and beyond will decide whether we elect climate leaders who will stand up to Trump and his dirty fossil fuel agenda — or oily politicians who will put profit over people. = | = = You may be wondering how a donation of just $1 could make a difference, but here’s why your support today could determine whether we win or lose in November: Every single seat in the Virginia House of Delegates is on the ballot. Republicans need just two flips to take control, and our opponents are spending over six figures in digital attack ads against one of our endorsed climate champions to make it happen. The race for Attorney General in Virginia is another high-stakes battle. Dominion Energy has dumped over $600,000 into re-electing their ally Jason Miyares and keeping our endorsed candidate, Jay Jones, out of office. They know Jay won’t hesitate to challenge corporate polluters and lead Virginia’s legal fight against Trump’s fossil fuel agenda. In Pennsylvania, Georgia, and more, our endorsed climate champions — from the Luzerne County Council to Georgia’s Public Service Commission — are in must-win fights that will determine whether communities get leaders brave enough to take on corporate polluters or politicians in Big Oil’s pocket. We don’t want to look back 51 days from now and wish we’d done more to support our climate champions when we had the time, which is why we’re turning to you for help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = The next 51 days will decide more than an election. They’ll decide what kind of future we fight for. We’re so grateful to have you on our team, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

body:
| | | **** Friend — The next two weeks are critical.
Our organizers and volunteers are knocking doors and talking directly with voters—but we can only reach everyone if we have the resources to fuel this final push.
[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3XlC2dXs5AeG50ELm382_QLviQ9RVLlw2kiw7ipnP7rAJbPwCp266bmXfp0Zxii0Me8CIbFfv1G-OJOZbCY_k65J60Jm_p4z2KOyoDq7zoiPmGk9Wwi5sRd-RoMhus7UufcbVcmotqkV_YmnD19Alj5LVKti0xFgU5kRrWAcjsh3L-rjUfbmcvq6UukowLbmMLyDuUfMfIQOptx0svPXxdy5Q62jYFiYITPdlbnEMWVKmEbrRQ1zu-xO37cPHAx_97amPUOsGzUS62Wx0j7b8BnunH4yeWjLKT-vZDasC2PY/4jw/Fj5Q2u1kRQ-Tn8RB233fmw/h0/h001.RK3lPa3obThbXyw-Dvr6nWBJZ8F545HdegUwwlMORZ4)This race isn’t just about one seat:**_it’s about party control of the entire Virginia House of Delegates._** Every conversation at a door or on the phone could be the one that protects our Democratic majority. Here’s what your donation does right now:
* $15 buys a pizza for volunteers
* $50 pays for 500 palm cards to hand out
* $100 buys ads to reach voters that our canvassers can’t

We don’t have time to waste. Every dollar you give today keeps our team moving and ensures no voter is left behind. **[Can you chip in before midnight so we can knock every door and protect Virginia’s Democratic majority?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqvhsqD6hnNNbCP7JMDskKO3a_YXZtly1EhcBN16psxxSEAz4lu95jvz1MGrM7Rg4wF0drcXDKUDNhjXMNA9tVDyouG5SCzv-mHou6dlQXFPov7kTm-XCSRroNS0MyBGyoZYADGRccoD_VqRIqclut3VGkqxET1a_iTYbGD2_2V6L0SJ5I_bcf6EJfYYesJ3n_jsXY_jamBdhik1UaDbFoUMwWmznbpQ6PEv_Ldn9-pO_CpESK5KEOgKWPA4Uf8cWQ505LuGeCgIjPTxPaGA7gmW1OMina36Gpo-zIn3rljy6Nwd1nlf5Ujr4viVxTgVwPw/4jw/Fj5Q2u1kRQ-Tn8RB233fmw/h1/h001.OuogDvbssJLsVBCpWqlILC21DTIREWur209ddeJp3Tw)********** Let’s finish this fight — together. clean_body: | | | ** Friend — The next two weeks are critical. Our organizers and volunteers are knocking doors and talking directly with voters—but we can only reach everyone if we have the resources to fuel this final push. race isn’t just about one seat:it’s about party control of the entire Virginia House of Delegates. Every conversation at a door or on the phone could be the one that protects our Democratic majority. Here’s what your donation does right now: $15 buys a pizza for volunteers $50 pays for 500 palm cards to hand out $100 buys ads to reach voters that our canvassers can’t We don’t have time to waste. Every dollar you give today keeps our team moving and ensures no voter is left behind. ******** Let’s finish this fight — together. Thank you for everything you do, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. I know you might be thinking: _Chris, what difference could just $1 really make in a race this competitive?_
Honestly, I get it—$1 doesn’t sound like much. It’s not even a cup of coffee these days (thanks, Trump). But here’s the truth: most people can’t afford to drop $50 or $100 on a political campaign, and I don’t expect them to.
Unlike a lot of politicians who are like pigs at the trough with corporate money, I refuse to play that game. I don’t take corporate PAC money—so I’m relying on this people-powered team to help me keep up my fight in the House.
**What makes our campaign strong is that thousands of people give what they can. And when more and more people chip in, those single dollars add up to something powerful._We proved it last year!_**
Pennsylvania is one of the toughest battlegrounds in the country, and I was one of the most heavily targeted incumbents. But thanks to thousands of grassroots supporters pitching in whatever they could, we didn’t just win—we expanded our margin of victory from 2022.
**Now, I’m the ONLY Democrat defending a battleground district in Pennsylvania, so Republicans think they can flip this seat red. But they’re wrong.**
I’m putting in the hard work to protect this seat and keep fighting for families in Western Pennsylvania: restoring the American Dream, taking on corporate power, fighting corruption, lowering costs, and protecting and expanding Social Security for future generations.
[**So Derek, if you want to help me defend this battleground seat and continue fighting for Western Pennsylvanians, please pitch in just $1—or whatever amount is right for you—before my fundraising deadline tomorrow →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115206875/569538708/-898016266?refcode=email_091425_mm2&amounts=1,25,50,100,250,500,1000&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNzFhN2QxMy04NDkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVpWoROy12erR1gOeCjuqC84k0HQP5FV9h9Ypedm0Cs=)

Trump’s DOJ Voter Data Power Grab** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115207276/569539739/-1876887045?refcode=em-9.14.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZmU0MmJkZC04MzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B4_AEAQrRwDcfY3czOeQLSxk-Gh3yX3Pj7MeJ1mfOeY=)**

Friend. The Trump administration is demanding voter registration data from states across the country, including from Maine, where **Secretary of State Shenna Bellows fired back on these demands** in no uncertain terms: “They really need to stay out of trying to interfere with our safe, free and secure elections.” She’s not alone. In Nevada, Secretary Cisco Aguilar is **fending off lawsuits from MAGA lawyers trying to dismantle voting protections.** In Michigan, Secretary Jocelyn Benson has faced death threats for defending democracy, **and hasn’t backed down.** In Arizona, Secretary Adrian Fontes continues to call out Trump directly for his lies and interference, **saying he can pound sand.** **We cannot afford to be passive while Trump’s DOJ turns federal power into a political lever he can turn at will.** Our democracy depends on courageous leaders in every state and on supporters like you stepping up when it matters most. These leaders are doing everything in their power to protect fair elections. But they can’t do it alone. body:
Democrats are getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks. We're counting on your help to defend them.
#
Please don't scroll past this message, Peter.
**Democrats running in must-win races across the country are already getting pummeled with well-funded GOP attacks.**
Billionaire-backed groups are pouring millions of dollars into these races — and we’re still more than a year away from the 2026 election! **[Will you help us fight back now?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94770?refcode=em20250914-9405&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9405%2E614464%2EQI-gkp)**
**[SUPPORT DEMOCRATS: CHIP IN NOW](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94770?refcode=em20250914-9405&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9405%2E614464%2EQI-gkp)**
We can’t afford to fall behind this early. The simple truth is that if we don’t start organizing and building our war chest now, we could risk letting MAGA Republicans define the narrative and keep their control over the Senate AND the House.
Over the coming weeks + months, we’re counting on grassroots supporters like you to help us prepare for the fight ahead. **We need the resources to help Democrats in must-win races introduce themselves to voters while also standing up to the inevitable onslaught of GOP attacks.[Will you rush a donation of any amount today to help us do it?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94770?refcode=em20250914-9405&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9405%2E614464%2EQI-gkp)**

Peter,
The future of California is on the line. Republicans want to flip the state red and our opponents are spending big.
Katie is in the lead and we need to keep it that way—**[will you chip in $5](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250914_1_ak?refcode=em20250914-40131&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40131_3422442_5oL30s&akid=40131%2E3422442%2E5oL30s)** right now to help us reach our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal?
$5 to help us scale this campaign to reach millions of Californians in order to elect Katie next year.
$5 to help us fight back against the $1.4 million in ads bought by Katie’s billionaire opponent.
$5 to elect a governor who will stand up to Trump as he tries to rip up our democracy. Katie held him accountable during his first term and she’ll do it again as governor.
This is a grassroots campaign. Katie doesn’t take a dime from Big Pharma or Big Oil companies. We’re counting on people like you to power this campaign.
**[So please, can you add a contribution of $5 right now to help us reach our mid-month goal of raising $10,000 before midnight tomorrow?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250914_1_ak?refcode=em20250914-40131&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40131_3422442_5oL30s&akid=40131%2E3422442%2E5oL30s)**

name: James Carville
subject: Ungodly amount of money
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada Rosen for Nevada
body:
We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod win in Ohio.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115208012/569542805/1180147037?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5603-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzkzM2E5MC04NDkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j65Gjs-TG1FmbFFiNdDVbJi21B1byjFbFyr0QTs9V0Y=)
Friend, it’s James Carville.
I’ve worked on a heck of a lot of campaigns. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you:
**Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now.**
[**Please chip in every dollar you can spare to Sherrod and Jacky Rosen's campaigns. He just got back in the race, and they need folks like you by his side ASAP.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115208014/569542809/1180147037?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5603-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5YzkzM2E5MC04NDkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=j65Gjs-TG1FmbFFiNdDVbJi21B1byjFbFyr0QTs9V0Y=)
We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on.
We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd!
_We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio._
Sherrod has spent his life supporting workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people.
**But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win.**
[**Folks, if anyone can flip Ohio’s Senate seat, it’s Sherrod Brown. Over the past 50 years, I’ve won – and I’ve lost – tough elections across the country. So believe me when I tell you: Sherrod Brown’s Senate race in Ohio is SO DAMN IMPORTANT, and the only way he can win it is with YOUR support – right here, right now. = We’re at a critical moment in American history. It’s like nothing I’ve ever seen before. Politicians in D.C. are raising costs, cutting veterans' benefits, closing rural hospitals, adding $3 trillion to our national debt – the list goes on. We’re moving further and further away from being anything close to democracy. It’s freakin’ absurd! We have to get our country back on track – and that starts by helping Sherrod Brown win in Ohio. Sherrod has spent his life supporting workers and families, and he’s got the moral courage to stand up to the powerful special interests that are making life harder and more expensive for everyday people. But outside spending groups will pour an UNGODLY amount of money into this race to defeat Sherrod (I’m talking hundreds of millions of dollars) – and it’s on us to give him the resources to fight back and win. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Jacky Rosen will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thanks, James Carville | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. subject: District Round-up 9.14.25

As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-... | [Read on blog](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2025/09/14/district-round-up-9-14-25/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F5152&sr=1&signature=b5592b1ce3a581e109a23a911b9f6bab&user=248418217&_&_z=z) | | [Beth Farnham for Congress](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup) | [Read on blog](http://bethfarnhamforcongress.com/2025/09/14/district-round-up-9-14-25/?jetpack_skip_subscription_popup) or [Reader](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.wordpress.com%2Freader%2Fblogs%2F213069660%2Fposts%2F5152&sr=1&signature=b5592b1ce3a581e109a23a911b9f6bab&user=248418217&_&_z=z)

# [District Round‐up 9.14.25](https://public-api.wordpress.com/bar/?stat=groovemails-events&bin=wpcom_email_click&redirect_to=http%3A%2F%2Fbethfarnhamforcongress.com%2F2025%2F09%2F14%2Fdistrict-round-up-9-14-25%2F%3Fjetpack_skip_subscription_popup&sr=0&signature=3a6c8ab107ea75538dc202cc4cdfce1b&blog_id=213069660&user=248418217&_&_z=z)
| | By **Elizabeth Farnham** on September 14, 2025
---|---
Dear Neighbor,
Thank you for reading my District Round-up. As your candidate for Pennsylvania’s 13th Congressional District, it is my honor and pleasure to deliver to you where I’ve been and what issues I’ve tackled in the past week. Criss-crossing the counties of Adams, Franklin, Fulton, Bedford, Cambria, Blair, Huntingdon, Mifflin, Juniata, Perry, Cumberland, and Somerset gives me great opportunities to meet with voters, hear what is on your hearts and minds, and the chance to voice my fight for Everyday Americans. If you would like to contribute to my campaign, please donate here: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beth-fa,rnham-for-congress-1](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=4585739fd1369f719f6a188b38e6bacac14a16275b6b79c073be1778c1dbca69&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=7f3d014c7ee53e038730e8a467f986dd&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url=aHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL2JldGgtZmFybmhhbS1mb3ItY29uZ3Jlc3MtMQ=&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b)
On Wednesday, political commentator, Charlie Kirk, was assissinated by a bullet in front of a large crowd and several cameras at Utah Valley University where he was holding a public event. While Charlie Kirk was barely on my radar, I disagreed with what I had heard from him, especially his racist, sexist, homophobic, and xenophobic remarks, but none stand out as much as this ironic quote of his that I later read, "I think it's worth it to have a cost of, unfortunately, some gun deaths every single year so that we can have the Second Amendment to protect other God-given rights. That is a prudent deal. It is rational."
Charlie Kirk was incredibly wrong about many people and that includes sacrificing himself for our Second Amendment right which is not "God-given" but created by the Revolutionary Founders who authored our Bill of Rights. He did not deserve to die for his words, as hateful and false as they were. Nor does our Second Amendment Right extend to mowing down our family, fellow students, neighbors, coworkers, lovers, ex-lovers, legislators, government leaders, pundits, and candidates with whom we philosophically, politically, and/or religiously disagree.
As a defender of Free Speech, knowing full well that it is about the government not persecuting us for our words alone, I broaden that understanding to include stumping on one's soapbox where venues and platforms allow. It is not political violence that diminishes the appeal of cruel rhetoric like Charlie Kirk's, but truthful counter messaging about Diversity, Equality, and Inclusion because DEI makes America great, not the guns.
While right-wing media began to assert that the alleged killer was transexual, Democratic, Black, and/or Muslim, the leading suspect was identified asTyler Robinson - a straight, white, Christian, American male whose father is in law enforcement and whose parents are registered Republicans who strongly encouraged their children to shoot guns. Pictures of him and his siblings holding or shooting guns abounded on his mother's Facebook page until she removed them.
In other words, the suspected perpetrator of this heinous and violent crime is:
NOT Trans.
NOT Muslim.
NOT Immigrant.
NOT Black.
NOT Feminist.
NOT Democrat.
And definitely NOT the "radical left" as President Trump wrongly asserted prior to any facts being known.
While gunning people down for expressing their RIGHT OF FREE SPEECH is deeply unAmerican, it seems that the people most likely to use gun violence are... Americans who profess "conservative values".
America, we can do better.
On Sunday, I enjoyed meeting members and volunteers of the the Cumberland County Democratic Committee who hosted their Rally for Cumberland. It was a delightful day for connecting with committee members, fellow candidates, and voters. I was thrilled by the number of candidates who are running this year for county commissioners, borough councils, school boards, mayors, and even prothonotary.
Their choice to run is a beautiful reflection of the ongoing experiment in self-governance our revolutionary founders sacrificed so much for.
On Monday, In response to Trump's disgusting birthday card to Jeffrey Epstein, I posted the following:
Why am I running?
[](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=95faa6d5804771dfac4b658ce63260698a9333016a3c6fce40d879ad985ddbc9&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=d2dfc28d5d3d95567433c7a02eca568e&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_url&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b)Because Everyday Americans deserve representation that represents us - the hard-working families, the retirees on a fixed income, the young adults just making their way, the nurses, the union members, the public school students, the veterans, and everyone who is NOT a multimillionaire covering up or supporting pedophilia, other human rights violations, financial crimes, constitutional violations, an incompetent tariff-by-tweet policy, declining cognition, job losses, denied healthcare and food assistance to the leat among us, and every other filthy behavior that lusts for power and money bring.
I run because the incredible sacrifices that every veteran, activist, and union member ever made in the name of Democracy, Women's Rights, Gun Safety, Public Education, Universal Healthcare, and Immigration Reform have not been in vain, but to improve our lives.
I run because our representation should be responsive and accessible, not a slimy request to subscribe to a newsletter, not a dodge to Town Halls, not votes that would deny The People of PA-13 Infrastructure funding, financial Rescue during a pandemic, Inflation Reduction, Women's Health, Emergency Climate Change Alert Funding, and more.
I run because if I don't, these creeps stay in power.
Please contribute to my campaign and vote these guys out of office by voting for me.
Together, we [#ChooseDemocracy](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d0ce23a40e13f7c24d017867550b758272c87e562597839cae340a5462d8608e&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=730580dc0a0ca6a104ca38cf1d36c895&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b) and Everyday Americans!
On Tuesday, I noted that farmers are not faring well from under the Trump Administration.
American soybean farmers aren't receiving orders from China.
"The absence of Chinese orders represents a dramatic departure from normal trading patterns. China typically accounted for over 25% of total U.S. soybean purchases, with roughly one-third of annual sales to the country normally booked by this point in the season. This translates to approximately 8%-9% of the entire U.S. crop that would typically be sold to China by now currently sitting at zero."
Farmer says 'we're in a very dire situation'—with zero soybean orders from China | Fortune [https://share.google/f8YHBODK6IIvP35wq](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=e1e4cdb36e467b99e871addb4152f2a71cf99c1ee9407e37fa918fe545ca8036&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=18b691bb306482276198329ccff56dd8&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b)
Farmers are feeling the effects of the tariffs due to "tariff-related cost increases on fertilizer, parts and equipment".
Read more at: [https://hermistonherald.com/.../tariff-surge-fuels.../](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=5cf181d4672f3e4e9360600e63aafab08bbcfe7fe712e4882e8e042463694d4c&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=dae543a6842ec020e943f0c841129bf6&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b)
"Wyden said the wheat ranchers and farmers he has spoken with are worried they may lose the ability to sell products to foreign buyers because of the administration’s recent tariff hikes. He said the hikes are unhelpful and unnecessary. "
Read more at: [https://hermistonherald.com/.../tariff-surge-fuels.../](https://bethfarnhamforcongress.wordpress.com?action=user_content_redirect&uuid=d253686e6038d509eb9e0112273883a9e51c1384e73fde4a0a64c0ba66892ca9&blog_id=213069660&post_id=5152&user_id=248418217&subs_id=487468588&signature=6177ca894b3f44a07c7ec4e47d0bb8ca&email_name=new-post&user_email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&encoded_&email_id=fe06d0cb61c6c6f3474db7b23dfaa03b)
When your grocery bill is higher, when local farms fail, be sure to thank Donald Trump for his incompetence and John Joyce for his silent support of Trump's incompetence.
On Thursday, I participated in Game Night with Pride Franklin County at Good Luck Have Fun in Chambersburg. We had a blast meeting new people and playing Telestrations.
And yesterday, I thanked the Cumberland Valley Breast Care Alliance for hosting a 5k today at Norlo Park in Franklin County. It was a beautiful day to walk for such a worthy cause. For those gone too soon from breast cancer, their memories are a blessing. For those diagnosed and fighting, it was a honor to walk among you. For everyone else - GET YOUR MAMMOGRAM.
Lastly, Jack and I demonstrated for Democracy with the Adams County Democratic Committee on the square of Gettysburg.
If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism.
We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you.
Sincerely,
Beth

Farmer says 'we're in a very dire situation'—with zero soybean orders from China | Fortune Farmers are feeling the effects of the tariffs due to "tariff-related cost increases on fertilizer, parts and equipment". Read more at: "Wyden said the wheat ranchers and farmers he has spoken with are worried they may lose the ability to sell products to foreign buyers because of the administration’s recent tariff hikes. He said the hikes are unhelpful and unnecessary. " Read more at: When your grocery bill is higher, when local farms fail, be sure to thank Donald Trump for his incompetence and John Joyce for his silent support of Trump's incompetence. On Thursday, I participated in Game Night with Pride Franklin County at Good Luck Have Fun in Chambersburg. We had a blast meeting new people and playing Telestrations. And yesterday, I thanked the Cumberland Valley Breast Care Alliance for hosting a 5k today at Norlo Park in Franklin County. It was a beautiful day to walk for such a worthy cause. For those gone too soon from breast cancer, their memories are a blessing. For those diagnosed and fighting, it was a honor to walk among you. For everyone else - GET YOUR MAMMOGRAM. Lastly, Jack and I demonstrated for Democracy with the Adams County Democratic Committee on the square of Gettysburg. If you’re like me, you love this country as much as I do and work to make a positive difference. In the midst of this Constitutional Crisis, please consider reaching out to your local Democratic committees or Democratic candidates so that we can strengthen our Democracy instead of letting it slide into fascism. We don’t just #ChooseDemocracy, we choose Pennsylvania, we choose The United States of America, we choose Humanity and I am deeply glad to work along side you. Sincerely, Beth | | | | | Beth Farnham for Congress © 2025. or . | | | | Get the Jetpack app Subscribe, bookmark, and get real‐time notifications - all from one app! | | | | ---|--- | | | | Automattic, Inc. 60 29th St. #343, San Francisco, CA 94110 |

clean_body: Friends, In the bluest city in America, Nicole Malliotakis is proving that Republicans can deliver. Nicole just helped pass real tax relief — expanding SALT and senior tax benefits to help more families and retirees keep more of their hard-earned money. This isn’t a promise or a proposal. It’s law. It’s real. | Hi Friends, In the bluest city in America, Nicole Malliotakis is proving that Republicans can deliver. Nicole just helped pass real tax relief — expanding SALT and senior tax benefits to help more families and retirees keep more of their hard-earned money. This isn’t a promise or a proposal. It’s law. It’s real. | | Nicole is the ONLY Republican Member of Congress from New York City — a seat she flipped in 2020 and has held against everything Schumer, Jeffries, and AOC have thrown at her. Friends, if Democrats win Congress back, they’ll erase these victories and tighten their grip on power. | This fight isn’t just about New York. It’s about keeping the House majority, protecting President Trump’s America First agenda, and proving Republicans can win anywhere. | | | | | | | | | | | | | Thanks for your support, Team Nicole | Nicole for New York, PO Box 60487, Staten Island, NY 10306

subject: Trump’s economy teeters from self-inflicted wounds

body:
New economic news should leave every American deeply alarmed... | | | Did you see the news, Friend? [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOuzWhMRYhpZRS1QqcdCNvGs3zJ-0Q2TUQW4yai_CmTeocc_g56_odMmESd2iIHKvaQEm0bPzK_luox9HOW38DzZSBhjg6LhrQLkQ61DBX03GWxdgWbRt-VVja5E9gRd4UbojyPrtDobv7ro9PJHM3irSUEOgdso7pTdNCLbEX-FNAb31pGYoQilQPWJC_eIK78a74DDkTIEEb7HOq-C23v7oona1ZF8CSe9tPwYT_K5FyYLV9VBmu0A5xJJ3Q3kCvDE0uLTO4ddib416cm3ReVWIapXe82a1hOW43heP8wLi-uXPbEU8iCn9TyBU3hG3Tg7_upDNDopV_1r5TwKYwcAixevemHnzoDHS21sOtkWw/4jw/TxCfZwJtS1yxxAL066x1pA/h0/h001.oJJalfa-Xih7rgQ-XaLejAmLPTZuDS5Cb_aku5pzxZ8)The New York Times published bombshell economic news that should leave every American deeply alarmed:
* The Bureau of Labor Statistics **revised job growth downward by 911,000 jobs********for the year ending March 2025** — **_the_ ___largest downward adjustment ever on record._**
* This reveals that the labor market was already sputtering before recent tariffs took effect — meaning the foundations of our economy are weaker than anyone realized.
* The biggest losses came in sectors that support hardworking families — **leisure and hospitality, retail, and professional services.**

This all underscores just how many Americans are struggling. **_It’s simply another day living in the wreckage of Trump’s disastrous economy._** Leadership in Washington, driven by political agendas, is failing to face this reality. We can’t afford complacency while people are losing jobs and their financial security erodes. **MAGA Republicans took power, and are crashing our economy. We need your help to FIRE them.** We’re gearing up to support candidates who know a resilient economy is built from the bottom up. **But we c****an’t do it without you.** **[Your donation — whether $15, $25, $50 or more — powers our outreach, keeps the pressure on Congress, and helps us protect working families during this downturn.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquatmgZTEMuLQ1bf-_rXJuOuzWhMRYhpZRS1QqcdCNvGne3MdKV-u9zJMdBY8WBZ5Nl4Y5nHp3lywf3Nq0krSg8G-v9Y-kMOCAwbhh5nm3Q8niommyMevEdWZ1s4N4Dgn4sx7O_Zb2IK86VwL1f74M_mbZCEithfG-O7QRqV3hjKmVYhA5v65ypRbfu0onIPUguUm1BkoaymApac6eOTwOj-spekjXj7KnOXs8m-4-9gZ8NAMFPgVJVWZhpky_FsLjtvvL1aj-QdhjAJbFBOYphCp4kCGfySQciV6LFUV9ZCAAV8CDhRHYKNh3IcPGIP1QGYH4CniwO8UNuuf7sx3fiIvBecOt1QlTmJwptZbek0n37PRkV83esjAIWeKefyL8/4jw/TxCfZwJtS1yxxAL066x1pA/h1/h001.6R--xVnqvArIKUi5BJh-81-WVFHgdrPOEzacmAQdRF8)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: New economic news should leave every American deeply alarmed... | | | Did you see the news, Friend? New York Times published bombshell economic news that should leave every American deeply alarmed: The Bureau of Labor Statistics revised job growth downward by 911,000 jobs******for the year ending March 2025 — the _largest downward adjustment ever on record. This reveals that the labor market was already sputtering before recent tariffs took effect — meaning the foundations of our economy are weaker than anyone realized. The biggest losses came in sectors that support hardworking families — leisure and hospitality, retail, and professional services. This all underscores just how many Americans are struggling. It’s simply another day living in the wreckage of Trump’s disastrous economy. Leadership in Washington, driven by political agendas, is failing to face this reality. We can’t afford complacency while people are losing jobs and their financial security erodes. MAGA Republicans took power, and are crashing our economy. We need your help to FIRE them. We’re gearing up to support candidates who know a resilient economy is built from the bottom up. But we can’t do it without you. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Economic declines this deep don’t fix themselves. With your support, Cedar Key Progress will keep workers front and center in the fight for a stronger, fairer future. Thank you for your support. In solidarity, The Cedar Key Progress Team | Cedar Key Progress support Democrats in competitive Southern districts who are building a diverse, inclusive, and just future. To donate by check, send to: Cedar Key Progress c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- \- Paid for by Cedar Key Progress and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Contributions or gifts to Cedar Key Progress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . This deadline will be one of our _best chances_ to show momentum and control the public narrative that Democrats have a winning plan. This is a big deal. name: Haley Stevens
subject: an important announcement on RFK Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I’m calling for his resignation

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5824?t=2&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)
---
null, it’s Haley Stevens, and I need you to read this:

**I’m calling on Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to resign immediately as Secretary of Health and Human Services.**
He has absolutely no business anywhere near our public health system.

**[If you agree RFK Jr. is unfit to serve, will you add your name to my petition calling for his resignation?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5825?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)**
| | [RFK Jr. Must Resign >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5825?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)
---
Since taking office, RFK Jr. has:

❌ Slashed billions from lifesaving research on cancer, addiction, HIV, and more.
!!️ Fired CDC Director Susan Monarez, throwing the agency into chaos.
🚨 Canceled vaccine campaigns and downplayed dangerous measles outbreaks.
🚫 Pushed junk science and bogus supplements instead of proven medicine.
🛑 Fired thousands of public health scientists and experts.

This isn’t just incompetence. It’s an attack on our health, our safety, and our future.

RFK Jr. has spent years pushing fringe theories and dangerous lies. Then Donald Trump appointed him Secretary of HHS, and they’ve dismantled decades of critical progress in a matter of months.
The HHS needs science-based leadership, not chaos. We need truth, not conspiracies. We need someone fighting for public health, not tearing it down.

I’m not going to stay silent while RFK Jr. risks lives and enables MAGA extremism in one of the most important agencies in our government.
**[Will you stand with me? Add your name now to demand RFK Jr. resign:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5825?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)**
| | [RFK Jr. Must Resign >>](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5825?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)
---
Thank you for standing up for science, safety, and sanity.

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5826?%3Femail=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5824?t=8&akid=819%2E49239%2EDoDUtn)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

Buffalo Grove Middle School Teacher Sparks Outrage With ‘Karma’ Remark on Charlie Kirk Killing (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2025/09/buffalo-grove-middle-school-teacher-sparks-outrage-with-karma-remark-on-charlie-kirk-killing.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=35a1e621fc-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_10_30_09_24_COPY_01&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-8b40ac336f-666344823)

Carolyn Pinta speaks during a Pride flag-raising ceremony in June 2023. (Shanna Madison/Chicago Tribune)
By Illinois Review

A Twin Groves Middle School teacher in Buffalo Grove, Ill., is facing public backlash after posting social media comments about the assassination of conservative activist Charlie Kirk — calling his death “ironic” after a friend remarked that “karma is a b**ch.”

“Mel Smith, listen — the irony is thick, right?” commented Carolyn Pinta. The middle school teacher went on to write that the now deceased Kirk “believed in sacrificing a few souls each year to keep his Second Amendment rights.”

In an earlier comment on the same thread, Pinta compared Kirk’s events to early Nazi rallies after another friend remarked about having “nightmares about thousands of young people showing up to listen to him.”

subject: The Phantom Economy: When Fake Jobs Vanish, Trust Erodes
body:
How do you "lose" a million jobs in one day?

| |
---|---|---

**On a crisp September morning** in 2025, the Bureau of Labor Statistics quietly dropped a bombshell. What had been heralded as a resilient post-pandemic job market under the waning days of the Biden administration was suddenly revealed to be far less robust. In fact it didn't exist and it never had.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0dc46546-0820-4c66-974d-4dcc5f9de719?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The agency revised its employment figures downward by a staggering 911,000 jobs for the period spanning March 2024 to March 2025--an adjustment that wiped out nearly a million positions that, on paper, had fueled optimism about economic recovery. This was not a statistical tweak, this was not a rounding error, this was not a slip of the pen. This was slightly less than the entire population of South Dakota (924,669) evaporating from the labor force because they didn't exist. It was the largest such revision in over a decade, evoking memories of the 2009 financial crisis when similar corrections exposed deep hitherto unforeseen vulnerabilities.
* * *
* * *
**[IN PARTNERSHIP WITH NEXT THING TECHNOLOGIES](https://substack.com/redirect/911e20c6-9cb0-439b-ae30-c824c7a2f7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[NVIDIA's $46.74B Earnings Prove AI Is Here to Stay...And This Can Power It All ](https://substack.com/redirect/911e20c6-9cb0-439b-ae30-c824c7a2f7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/911e20c6-9cb0-439b-ae30-c824c7a2f7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
NVIDIA shocked Wall Street again with **$46.74 billion in revenue** , up **56% year over year.**
Their CFO now expects**$3 -$4 trillion in AI infrastructure spending by 2030.**1
Oracle's results tell the same story.
The company reported**$14.9 billion in revenue, up 12% year over year.** Cloud infrastructure sales jumped**55%** , while long-term cloud contracts surged to**$455 billion -- a 359% increase in just one year.**
The message couldn't be clearer: **AI isn 't a bubble. It's the new economy.**1
**The Problem No One Talks About:**
Data centers and AI supercomputers run 24/7, devouring electricity.
But **lithium batteries can 't keep up**.1 They're too expensive, supplies are tight, and**China controls more than 80% of global lithium processing.**
If AI is going to scale to trillions of dollars, the real constraint isn't chips...
It's power storage.1
**The Breakthrough That Could Change Everything**
That's why **sodium-ion batteries** are emerging as the solution.1
* Sodium is**1,400x more abundant** **than lithium** , with significant reserves located in the U.S9
* Batteries can be made at a **fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6**
* They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1

And **Next Thing Technologies** , an American-owned company, is bringing this breakthrough to market. Their sodium-ion batteries are designed to power everything from **massive AI data centers** to **affordable home backup systems**.1
Think about it: NVIDIA builds the chips.
Oracle runs the cloud. But without safer, cheaper, U.S.-made batteries, the AI boom hits a wall.
Next Thing Technologies is building the infrastructure that could make it possible.1
Already, **7,800+ investors have committed more than $7 million. 3** And right now, [shares are available at just ](https://substack.com/redirect/911e20c6-9cb0-439b-ae30-c824c7a2f7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[$6 with up to 20% in bonus shares.4](https://substack.com/redirect/911e20c6-9cb0-439b-ae30-c824c7a2f7cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
