Here is a photo of us on our wedding day, as proof. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115214969/569566651/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LisaCollis_250914_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjZWVlMy1hMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YulTxbp89ELlicddV3urzJNom5RotY5wlpbN1edcd9I=) When I married Mark, all those years ago, I never imagined how many election nights we would spend together watching vote results roll in. He lost the first one, and won the rest, but that includes 2014, where he won by a razor thin margin of less than 1%. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115214970/569566652/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LisaCollis_250914_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjZWVlMy1hMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YulTxbp89ELlicddV3urzJNom5RotY5wlpbN1edcd9I=) And, here we are again, another election, but an election that feels so much more consequential. November 2026 sounds far away, but I now know enough to realize how the campaign flies by and how important these early months are.

The decisions his campaign will make in the next weeks will be very important to the outcome on Election Day next year, and I for one do not want the same close call we lived through in 2014.

[_**That is why I am personally reaching out to ask you to make your first contribution today to re-elect Mark. Right now is when your support will be most crucial, because it helps his campaign build the infrastructure needed to win.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115214971/569566653/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LisaCollis_250914_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjZWVlMy1hMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YulTxbp89ELlicddV3urzJNom5RotY5wlpbN1edcd9I=) **********[Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115214972/569566654/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LisaCollis_250914_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjZWVlMy1hMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YulTxbp89ELlicddV3urzJNom5RotY5wlpbN1edcd9I=)********** I will end with this: whether or not you donate today, I do know that Mark is truly grateful to have so many concerned and engaged supporters like you behind him. The last 8 months of the Trump administration have been difficult and alarming for all of us. Thank you for staying engaged in this fight.

Your support means the world to both of us.

Sincerely,

Lisa **********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115214973/569566655/1082117603?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_LisaCollis_250914_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Y2VjZWVlMy1hMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YulTxbp89ELlicddV3urzJNom5RotY5wlpbN1edcd9I=)**********

name: Chris Taylor HQ
subject: Whoever is elected governor in 2026 will wield enormous power over our state
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20250914-562&t=1&akid=573%2E294397%2EJfPnQN)
With Governor Tony Evers announcing he won’t run for re-election, Wisconsin’s political future is more uncertain than it’s been in years.
Whoever is elected governor in 2026 will wield enormous power over our state.
If that power is abused, the Wisconsin Supreme Court will be one of the only checks left.
That’s why this race matters so much.
**The Wisconsin Supreme Court will decide whether our state remains fair, impartial, and committed to protecting the rights and freedoms of all Wisconsinites — or whether it becomes a rubber stamp for extreme special interests.**
Judge Chris Taylor has spent her career fighting for the people, protecting constitutional freedoms, and making sure everyone is heard and respected in our legal system.
She’s ready to bring these values to our state’s highest court, but she can’t win this race without your support.
[**Will you contribute $10 today to help elect Judge Chris Taylor and protect a fair, independent Wisconsin Supreme Court?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250914_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250914-562&refcode2=573_294397_JfPnQN&akid=573%2E294397%2EJfPnQN)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_20250914_1_ak?amount=10&refcode=em20250914-562&refcode2=573_294397_JfPnQN&akid=573%2E294397%2EJfPnQN)**
Thanks so much,
Team Taylor
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer&refcode=em20250914-562?t=2&refcode2=573_294397_JfPnQN&akid=573%2E294397%2EJfPnQN)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: Wes Moore
subject: I’m proud to be running for reelection, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250914-9413&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9413%2E614464%2E3GAICU)
Hey, Peter – it’s Wes Moore.
I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me: **I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland.**
Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Heartland Patriots’ support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too.
**[Would you please split a contribution of $10 – or any amount that feels right to you – between my campaign and Heartland Patriots? I can’t win this race without you.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250914-9413&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9413%2E614464%2E3GAICU)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250914-9413&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9413%2E614464%2E3GAICU)**
Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together.
But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: **I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026.**
They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back.
But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, _let them try._
Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland.
**[Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. I’d be so grateful if you’d split a $10 donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94572?refcode=em20250914-9413&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9413%2E614464%2E3GAICU)**
Elevate,
Wes

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)
---|---|---

clean_body: Together, we can make sure we’re ready for whatever attacks come our way. Hey, Peter – it’s Wes Moore. I wanted to make sure you heard the news from me: I’m proud to announce that I’m running for another term as Governor of Maryland. Our work to make this Maryland’s decade is just getting started, and I’m incredibly grateful to have Heartland Patriots’ support in this race. Now, I’m asking if you’ll have my back, too. Over the past three years, we’ve made tremendous strides to support Maryland families. From ensuring our children receive a world-class education, to building pathways to good jobs, to lowering taxes for the middle class, I couldn’t be prouder of how far we’ve come together. But these past couple weeks have made one thing crystal clear: I am now in Donald Trump’s sights. Republicans are already gearing up to take my seat in 2026. They’re afraid of the results we’ve delivered for Maryland. From public safety improvements to funding public education, our opponents are trying to roll it all back. But here’s what they don’t know: I don’t back down from a fight. If they want to tear down our accomplishments, let them try. Peter, that’s why I need you with me. In order to stay in this fight, I’m asking for your early support as we launch our reelection so we can keep delivering results for Maryland. Elevate, Wes | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

name: Winsome Earle-Sears
subject: Just $1.75 changed my life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Winsome for Governor
body:
Friend - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.
[Unsubscribe](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2079g00y6imq8h5qyy2mcwjg74z05tmp0xe5cyv380d8hqj1n2ygewptrloitqcess6e7ba4i80n3bfz59q&__stmp=t2lh52&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh)

| | |
---
| | | [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
Friend - I often think about my father's journey to America. He arrived with just $1.75 in his pocket and a dream in his heart. It's a reminder that the American Dream is within reach, no matter where we start.

As I run for Governor of Virginia, I'm reminded of the power of small actions adding up to make a big difference. That's why I'm writing to ask for your help today.

_**If every person reading this email could give just $1.75, we would hit our major fundraising goal and be one step closer to winning this toss-up race.**_ It's a small ask, but it would make a huge impact.
---
[ Give $1.75 ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Give More** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
You see, my father's story isn't just about him - it's about the opportunities that America provides. It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for.

As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. _**And I'm just getting started.**_

[**So I'm asking you to join me in this fight. Will you give $1.75 today to help us reach our goal? It may seem like a small amount, but trust me, it will add up to make a big difference.**](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
[ Give $1.75 ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
[ **Give More** ](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)
---
Together, we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. We can build a brighter future, and we can show the country what it means to lead with conservative values.

Thank you for your support, and let's do this!

Winsome Earle-Sears
* * *
[](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h) Immigrant.
Marine.
Mom.
Small Business Owner.
Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. _**[That's why I'm reaching out to you asking for a helping hand to propel me to a win in my race for Governor.](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h)**_ This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h) [LEND A HAND](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h) [](http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=t2lh52&__onlt=h) | Paid for by Winsome for Governor

It's about the chance to build a better life, to work hard, and to succeed. And that's exactly what I'm fighting for. As a Marine, a businesswoman, and a public servant, I've seen firsthand the positive impact that conservative policies can have on our communities. I've fought for education reform, economic growth, and individual freedom. And I'm just getting started. Together, we can keep the American Dream alive for our kids and grandkids. We can build a brighter future, and we can show the country what it means to lead with conservative values. Thank you for your support, and let's do this! Winsome Earle-Sears Immigrant. Marine. Mom. Small Business Owner. Lieutenant Governor. I'm Winsome Earle-Sears, and I've held many titles in my life. Each one hasn't been a cakewalk, but I like a challenge. I've tried to show my daughters that what you can accomplish is not decided by the color of your skin or where you were born. Sure, a silver spoon would've made it easier, but I've found a helping hand from your community means so much more. ** This will be another challenge, but with you on my side, I know I can do this. | Paid for by Winsome for Governor Neither military info nor photographs of Winsome Earle-Sears in uniform imply endorsement of Winsome Earle-Sears by the Department of Defense or its particular military departments. PO Box 71596 Richmond, VA 23255-1596 To Unsubscribe by email, please reply to this message with Unsubscribe as the Subject Line. .

name: Congressman Bennie Thompson
subject: Zoe Lofgren is a fighter, and we need her in Congress, Peter.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lofgren for Congress
body:
We need to stand up to Trump’s lies.| |
---
| | Dear Peter – it’s Congressman Bennie Thompson.
---
| | I was proud to serve on the January 6th Committee with Congresswoman Zoe Lofgren.

After the violent attacks on the Capitol, our Committee worked diligently to uncover the threats to our democracy and deliver justice.

Since that day, Donald Trump has never stopped undermining the rule of law, degrading our democracy, eroding our Constitution, or lying about the work of our Committee.

In the face of Trump’s lawless contempt for our justice system and our democracy, Zoe Lofgren has led the resistance, fighting to uphold our Constitution and stop Republicans’ far-right policies.

body:
There’s too much at stake to fail now.
# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=2350%2E582294%2E2hakVx)
We’re coming down to the wire:
[**Between now and midnight tomorrow, we _must_ meet our mid-month goal: 20,000 grassroots donors standing behind Chris and Granite State values. We’re only a few thousand short — you can make the difference right now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250914_2_mm?refcode=em20250914-2350&amount=5&refcode2=2350_582294_2hakVx&akid=2350%2E582294%2E2hakVx)

Here’s what’s at stake:
* Standing up for working families, small businesses, and communities across New Hampshire
* Protecting reproductive freedom and LGBTQ+ rights
* Building an economy that’s for everyone, not just billionaires, corporate CEOs, and special interests
* Rejecting Trump’s cruelty and proving that our Granite State values — individual freedom, compassion, and looking out for one another — are stronger than he’ll ever be
* Showing that this movement has the size, strength, and resources to beat the odds and overcome a flood of dark money against Chris and _win this race_

[**With so much on the line, failure is not an option. Will you join this movement and help Chris cross the finish line by giving $5 or whatever makes sense for you?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_20250914_2_mm?refcode=em20250914-2350&amount=5&refcode2=2350_582294_2hakVx&akid=2350%2E582294%2E2hakVx)
Thank you for your support,
Team Pappas
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country in 2026. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**

name: Team Bell
subject: This is a major test for this campaign
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

We’re halfway through the month, _and soon we’ll be facing our next end-of-quarter fundraising deadline—one of the last major deadlines of the year._

Right now, extremist Republicans are already working overtime to secure their grip on our democracy. They’re trying to gerrymander Missouri congressional maps in their favor and stack the deck to expand their razor-thin majority in Congress.

They aren’t waiting until Election Day to try to tilt the field, and neither should we. That’s why this mid-month deadline matters so much. If Democrats can show the strength and momentum of this campaign now, **we can set our movement up for victory in the midterms.**

Wesley is fighting for us in the House, and we need to have his back heading into one of the most consequential elections of our lifetime. [**Will you chip in $5 or more before tomorrow’s mid-month deadline to invest in this movement to defend our name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: Your view: Trump's voting access executive order
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
You are invited to join our one-click issue response poll.
For data integrity purposes, please do not complete this survey if your email address is not dpwillis67@gmail.com .
Team: On his first day in office, President Donald Trump rescinded former President Joe Biden’s 2021 executive order promoting voting access and expanding voter registration.
Biden’s order expanded access to voting and accurate election information in many ways, such as allowing federal agencies to share data with states that seek to establish automatic voter registration efforts and making federal workers and resources available to assist at polling locations. Now, Trump has taken that away, among his other orders attacking voting rights.
We're looking to see how our supporters feel about this order. Please take our quick survey:
Team: Do you agree with rescinding this order that helped promote voter access and expand registration?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091425_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=091425_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091425_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=091425_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

Families are working harder than ever and getting less in return. And not a single one of these Republicans has a real solution. They’re not fighting for Georgia. **They’re fighting for Trump.** Peter, Georgians are demanding change — not a Senate seat sold off to the highest bidder or handed to Trump’s next yes-man. We need leadership focused on **_our communities_** , NOT Mar-a-Lago. **We’ve set a $18,000 mid-month fundraising goal to fuel our outreach efforts** — every call, every door knock, every ad that tells the truth about _what’s at stake._ REMEMBER: What happens in Georgia next year will decide control of the Senate. # _Opinion:_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/502d638b-af84-4729-9874-e18e3e33d34c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It has been a rough week with the assassination of Charlie Kirk, co-founder of Turning Point USA. Like many people in the America First movement, I was helped in finding my place in the political world because of Charlie and TPUSA. My tribute to Charlie **[can be read here.](https://substack.com/redirect/df3348e8-3563-4975-b118-337e4fbdf26d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
In short, if I did not meet him all those years ago, I wouldn't be writing to you now.
My story because who Charlie was is not unique. He inspired millions of conservatives and brought our beliefs to the other side of the aisle in spirited debates. Which is why his killing is so distressing. He was not causing chaos or physical harm, he was simply having a conversation.
In the time since Charlie's death, we now know the suspected gunman reportedly talked about how Charlie was a "fascist" and was spreading "hate." There is no doubt that the gunman killed Charlie because he did not like the views that the TPUSA espoused.
It is not surprising to see politicians appealing to be "united" in a horrible time such as this and to tone down the rhetoric about each other. If anything, leftists have shown a complete disregard to such requests and are continuing to spew their hatred.

**[Together with Next Thing Technologies](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **NVIDIA's $46.74B Earnings Prove AI Is Here to Stay ...And This Can Power It All**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
NVIDIA shocked Wall Street again with **$46.74 billion in revenue** , up **56% year over year.**
Their CFO now expects**$3 -$4 trillion in AI infrastructure spending by 2030.**1
Oracle's results tell the same story.
The company reported**$14.9 billion in revenue, up 12% year over year.** Cloud infrastructure sales jumped**55%** , while long-term cloud contracts surged to**$455 billion -- a 359% increase in just one year.**
The message couldn't be clearer: **AI isn 't a bubble. It's the new economy.**1
**The Problem No One Talks About:**
Data centers and AI supercomputers run 24/7, devouring electricity.
But **lithium batteries can 't keep up**.1 They're too expensive, supplies are tight, and**China controls more than 80% of global lithium processing.**
If AI is going to scale to trillions of dollars, the real constraint isn't chips...
It's power storage.1
**The Breakthrough That Could Change Everything**
That's why **sodium-ion batteries** are emerging as the solution.1
* Sodium is**1,400x more abundant** **than lithium** , with significant reserves located in the U.S9
* Batteries can be made at a **fraction of the cost of lithium -- up to 90% less expensive in the first year of use.6**
* They last longer8, are safer7, and can be built at scale using domestic materials.1

And **Next Thing Technologies** , an American-owned company, is bringing this breakthrough to market. Their sodium-ion batteries are designed to power everything from **massive AI data centers** to **affordable home backup systems**.1
Think about it: NVIDIA builds the chips.
Oracle runs the cloud. But without safer, cheaper, U.S.-made batteries, the AI boom hits a wall.
Next Thing Technologies is building the infrastructure that could make it possible.1
Already, **7,800+ investors have committed more than $7 million. 3** And right now, [shares are available at just ](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[$6 with up to 20% in bonus shares.4](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[👉 ](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[Click here to invest in the power behind the AI revolution.](https://substack.com/redirect/45701232-a57f-4e1e-8fc0-93eba71c6183?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* * *
**(Piece continues)**
Charlie's killing has revealed how deep the rot within the Left is. Tens of thousands of people have made social media posts and videos celebrating his brutal and unjust death. Many of those posts have gotten tens of thousands of likes and shares, sometimes even hundreds of thousands. What has been remarkable is how these people have had no qualms posting vile remarks under their real names, often with their jobs linked to their profiles. The Left has been comfortable online to show the country who they really are because of the coddling from Big Tech.
That request to tone down rhetoric has not been adhered to by the activists in the streets. On Friday, far-leftists gathered once again outside the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement processing building in Broadview, Illinois, located just outside the city limits of Chicago. For over 12 hours, activists and agitators blocked the road in front of the federal site. They sat and stood in the driveways in an attempt to prevent federal vehicles from entering.
This required ICE's and Customs and Border Protection's Special Response Teams to physically remove people from the premises to allow the vehicles to pass. The process had to be repeated over and over.
Federal agents leaving and entering on foot **[were chased after and heckled](https://substack.com/redirect/3f3d7de4-3dc4-4a3a-ab99-aa87385b73b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**. Every time the SRTs came out to secure the scene, the mob would **[get in the agents' faces or block their path.](https://substack.com/redirect/6bef1c1b-5686-4b84-99c5-256c7c6d4a0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** More than a few times did agents have to shove those people out of the way.
The same hate directed at Charlie was now being funneled towards the ICE and CBP agents all day.
The Left has been whipped up into an intense frenzy because the Trump administration has been clear on its intent to deliver on President Donald Trump's campaign promises.
That is why the tragedy from this past week has been months in the making because of Democrats' rhetoric and false attacks on the MAGA movement. Remember that **[Axios reported](https://substack.com/redirect/657ceb77-a985-47d2-a3f1-b17acda0af15?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** a few months ago how Democrats in Congress had been hearing from their voters that they are not doing enough radical actions to stop Trump. They were hearing from their own people that violence and blood is now necessary.
It is an evil that can only be described as demonic.
I would like to end on a good note: Many people who have been openly celebrating Charlie's death and calling for more of that have been fired from their jobs.
I would ask for you to continue to pray for Charlie's family, TPUSA, and for justice to be done. The Left must be held accountable for this horrible event.

subject: Our nation is shrinking. And babies are dying.
body:

Please read the following message from our sponsor.

Will Americans Be Replaced? Nation’s Birth Rate Reaches Lowest Point in History.Fellow American, Federal health data just confirmed it: America’s birth rate has plunged to its lowest point in history, just 1.599 children per woman. That’s well below the replacement rate.What does that mean? If nothing changes, the only way to sustain our economy, workforce, and national future is to import it. Or we risk watching it collapse. At the same time, abortion is rising again. The very future of our nation is vanishing. We’re losing a generation not only to cultural shifts and economic fears, but to the direct, intentional ending of life in the womb through the abortion pill. But there is hope. PreBorn! is fighting back with life-saving, truth-filled, compassionate care. We equip our PreBorn! Network Clinics across the country to offer free ultrasounds to women and families in crisis, often giving them their first real glimpse into the new life God has given them. Here's why that matters: When mothers see their babies through an ultrasound, they choose life 80% of the time.This isn’t a policy battle. It’s a personal one. It's one mom, one baby, one heartbeat at a time.Your gift of $28 can fund one ultrasound and save one life. Will you stand with PreBorn! on the frontline by giving a gift at the link below? preborn.com/DB0825GPStand up for life. Stand up for America. Give your gift today! Dan SteinerPresident, PreBorn!

Here's the deal: _Abigail needs your support today to win the biggest election of 2025._
Early voting begins in a matter of days and the latest polls show MAGA Republican Winsome Earle-Sears gaining ground. She's spent nearly $10 million against us so far, with national Republicans piling on more each and every day.
This is our only chance in the country to flip a Governor's office blue – and we're not taking anything for granted.
Your $25 will fund TV and digital ads in key media markets.
Your $25 will provide organizers with literature and yard signs to gain support on the ground.
Your $25 will empower us to counter Trump's attacks and keep putting Virginia first.
_We could keep going, but the bottom line is this: your $25 today will have a huge impact._
[_**Now, if electing Abigail, flipping Virginia blue, and standing up to Trump's extreme agenda is important to you, we hope you'll donate right away. Whether it's for $10, $25, or even more, make sure you pitch in before our mid-month deadline.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115217501/569574807/830632682?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-09-14_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOTY1MGU0ZjktYjE5MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=kaFrpCcCZRkVETHXUebBi-rWI2olHHE2Qp-zjGdBLGM=)

clean_body: We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but here's why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = We don't expect you to donate to every email we send, but please give us 30 seconds to explain why it's so important that you donate to Abigail's campaign for Governor today. = Here's the deal: Abigail needs your support today to win the biggest election of 2025. Early voting begins in a matter of days and the latest polls show MAGA Republican Winsome Earle-Sears gaining ground. She's spent nearly $10 million against us so far, with national Republicans piling on more each and every day. This is our only chance in the country to flip a Governor's office blue – and we're not taking anything for granted. Your $25 will fund TV and digital ads in key media markets. Your $25 will provide organizers with literature and yard signs to gain support on the ground. Your $25 will empower us to counter Trump's attacks and keep putting Virginia first. We could keep going, but the bottom line is this: your $25 today will have a huge impact. = = = = = = = Thanks for stepping up, Spanberger for Governor HQ By submitting your phone number you're agreeing to receive periodic text messages from the Spanberger for Governor campaign. body:
With RFK Jr. at the helm in D.C., Colorado's going to need a governor who will protect us from his anti-vax policies.
With RFK Jr. at the helm in D.C., Colorado's going to need a governor who will protect us from his anti-vax policies.
| | |
---
Full disclosure: [We're about to ask you to donate to Michael Bennet's campaign ahead of his crucial mid-month deadline tomorrow at midnight. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115217626/569575193/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk909-fr-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVlZjhhOS1iMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mc0YkJoeqiUOs6wb7V3iVpATZ2vChJ526aWNIT65dc=)

But before you do, friend, we need to make sure you know what's going on at the Department of Health and Human Services under Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr.'s disastrous command – __**and how Michael's fighting back:**
**Last month: **RFK Jr. sacked the new CDC director because she challenged his undermining of vaccine safety and access across the country, _just as kids are getting back to school._
**So last week: **At a Senate hearing, Michael Bennet tore into RFK Jr. for sending the HHS into chaos and recklessly endangering the health of working families, and joined the call for Sec. Kennedy to resign or be fired immediately.
**AND NOW:** **As long as RFK Jr. remains at his post, we may not be able to expe ct truthful, science-based health guidance to come from Washington, D.C.**
That means Colorado is going to need a governor who will expand affordable access to health care, make decisions based on science and data and prioritize our public health and well-being.
Michael Bennet is running to deliver the competent leadership Colorado needs – **but MAGA dark money donors are ready to flood the state's airwaves with dishonest attack ads to stop him. ****And without your help to ensure Michael hits his $20,000 mid-month goal by tomorrow night, they might just succeed.**
We can't afford for that to happen –**_[so please, friend, will you help Michael safeguard Colorado's health as our next governor by chipping in $5, or anything you can spare, right away?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115217627/569575194/851209409?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk909-fr-d&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZjVlZjhhOS1iMjkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0mc0YkJoeqiUOs6wb7V3iVpATZ2vChJ526aWNIT65dc=)_**

name: Janelle Bynum
subject: need your support
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
Rep. Janelle Bynum here. I want to tell you about what I’m doing in Congress and why I need your help. But first, I have to ask:

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115217860/569576278/-629675555?refcode=email_091425_support&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZkZDQ2MjYtYjY5MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8vsDhhyLWrrW4Ss5I0jpSPVT0naDXMKw_yQf-1YQME=) Hi, Rep. Janelle Bynum here. I want to tell you about what I’m doing in Congress and why I need your help. But first, I have to ask: **[Can you chip in to help me defend one of the most important House seats in the country for Democrats?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115217862/569576281/-629675555?refcode=email_091425_support&amounts=5,15,25,50,100&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzZkZDQ2MjYtYjY5MS1mMDExLWI0ODQtNjA0NWJkZWI3NDEzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=D8vsDhhyLWrrW4Ss5I0jpSPVT0naDXMKw_yQf-1YQME=)** I wouldn’t be asking if your support weren’t crucial to my campaign and my work in Congress. Here’s just _some_ of the many reasons why your support matters: Your support helps me keep fighting to ensure our communities thrive, by passing the ELEVATE Act to support small businesses and power our local economies. Your support helps me keep pushing for the Republican-led House to finally bring a cost-fighting bill to the floor to lower costs and make life easier for Oregon families. Your support helps me continue advocating for more transparency in our government, like signing on to a bipartisan petition to demand the release of the Epstein Files and give the American people the answers we deserve. **Cliff 's Note:** _**This is the first contributor column by our new COO, Fred Poag. Everyone give Fred a warm welcome, and read this piece! We 're lucky to him him!**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0cadd287-2342-43df-ba4c-c1dc4789c3ee?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This image from video provided by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement via DVIDS shows manufacturing plant employees waiting to have their legs shackled at the Hyundai Motor Group's electric vehicle plant, Thursday, Sept. 4, 2025, in Ellabell, Ga. (Corey Bullard/U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement via AP)caption..
On September 5th, 2025 an electric automotive battery plant that's still under development in Georgia was raided by ICE. Over 450 workers were detained and many arrested. Three hundred of those were South Korean workers.
To date it's the largest single ICE raid in US history. And [in the running for its most idiotic](https://substack.com/redirect/7e1cf4f2-e0ae-4c26-8e2a-09e7490d2f7f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
These workers were under the B-1 Business Visitor Visa program, which is short term not a long-term visa meant to establish residency and ultimately obtain U.S. Citizenship. They were in Georgia to get Hyundai's electric battery plant up and running.
The plant, located west of Savannah in Ellabell, Georgia, was an economic development project that was projected to bring in billions of dollars to the region.
But now it's anyone's guess as to whether Hyundai will want to actually keep the plant or scrap the whole thing. One thing is almost certain, any expansion plans for Hyundai in the region--or U.S. in general--will be under serious reconsideration.
* * *
_**Dixieland Delights: Institutional Racism with a side of Secession**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/661dab25-2be4-4b28-b4c8-57e3814dcc99?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
> "We regard every man in our midst an enemy to the institutions of the South, who does not boldly declare that he believes African slavery to be a social, moral, and political blessing." - _Atlanta Confederacy,_ 1860
Back when I lived in East Tennessee in 2012, I saw up close the cost of voting against your own economic interests for the sake of bigotry. It's been part of a long tradition in the South--to economically cut off your nose to spite your face.
Even if that cutting is designed to only help a certain class of elites.
It's why the South ultimately seceded over the issue of slavery in 1861 even though there was a dedicated, vocal minority opposition that were capitalist. They were also largely racist, but understood that the institution of Black Slavery was costing them economic opportunities at home and abroad.
As a history professor of mine liked to say "It's easier to change the name of the god on the temple than it is to change the practice."
And [when it comes to white supremacy](https://substack.com/redirect/c05e8b1e-a4e1-4a3d-9854-71079293a99e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) The United States has had a shit ton of practice.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.kneSz0fEnDJ2a_hhE1CskCdG-g6N0BlzafLM1tw9yO8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173172051)
* * *
_**Gimme that Olde Tyme Bigotry**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8fdd0c1d-3467-4f3a-b67f-a7a1dc177208?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
U.S. Sen. Eric Schmitt, of Missouri, speaking in Washington on Tuesday September 2nd, 2025. Dominic Gwinn/ZUMA Press Wire via Reuters Connect
> _What is an American? ... The white Europeans who settled America and conquered the West... believed they were forging a nation--a homeland for themselves and their descendants. They fought, they bled, they struggled, they died for us. They built this country for us. _
> _America, in all its glory, is their gift to us, handed down across the generations. It belongs to us. It 's our birthright, our heritage, our destiny. If America is everything and everyone, then it is nothing and no one at all. But we know that's not true. America is not a 'universal nation'._
[Those remarks were delivered by Eric Schmitt](https://substack.com/redirect/af8176d7-e350-4773-8cbd-4553abd29dbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), junior United States Senator from Missouri, at the fifth annual National Conservatism Conference.
The NCC is an organization that proclaims their mission is to stand in opposition to China and the "powerful new Marxism at home."
But that they also "see the rich tradition of national conservative thought as an intellectually serious alternative to the excesses of purist libertarianism, and in stark opposition to political theories grounded in race."
Translation: _Anything outside of White, Patriarchal Christian Nationalist America lacks value. In fact, we 're going to stand in opposition to it._
So the role of the Spanish in American history; colonizing Texas, the entire Southwest...even cities like Los Angeles that still bear Spanish names. They were obviously White too, right?
Nope. Not according to Eric Schmitt, who specifically mentioned The Pilgrims, but subtly, to give himself some wiggle room.
> _We Americans are the sons and daughters of the Christian pilgrims that poured out from Europe 's shores to baptize a new world in their ancient faith. Our ancestors were driven here by destiny, possessed by urgent and fiery conviction, by burning belief, devoted to their cause and their God._
Now all of this might seem like just a casual, overgeneralized sentiment, but it's a carefully crafted speech. The use of the word "pilgrim" is purposeful.
Because even though many on religious journeys are of referred to as a pilgrims, when Americans use that word it conjures images of men with belt buckles on steeple gates carrying blunderbusses. There's a mythology built up that supports a particular image with that word.
Namely, White and Protestant.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae8f30fe-f782-4ea3-a213-d7a417608cd7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Here's [the real white supremacy tell](https://substack.com/redirect/f8865aa6-8cee-4c9a-a428-c21364a53046?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
Words like "fiery" and "burning" as terms of conviction and belief. He's talking about his ancestors doing it for "their beliefs" and "their God," which just happen to be the same as his beliefs and his God.
Those words are meant to conjure up an image of an exclusionary God. One for whom many non-believers were burnt at the stake, and for whom another dark tradition was founded in which Missouri is heavily steeped.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e6569f29-38ad-4dfb-8783-a8e8469ed76f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Picture in the Art Institute of Chicago. KKK Cross Burning photo taken in 1937. Photographer Unknown
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuYmx1ZWFtcC5jby9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.kneSz0fEnDJ2a_hhE1CskCdG-g6N0BlzafLM1tw9yO8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=173172051)
* * *
_**The Collections Calls for White Supremacy are Coming In**_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/14381889-4978-4722-b183-5db411558871?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Protesters stage a rally against the detention of South Korean workers during an immigration raid in Georgia, near the U.S. Embassy in Seoul, South Korea, Tuesday, Sept. 9, 2025. The signs read "A tariff bomb and workers confinement." (AP Photo/Ahn Young-joon)
So what was the South Korean government's response to the ICE raid in Georgia?
According to the AP South Korea is already considering withdrawing from their plant in Georgia.
> _South Korea, already a top investor, pledged to invest $350 billion in the U.S. when the two sides announced a trade deal in July._
> _It made more investments in new construction, such as factories, on previously undeveloped land than any other country in 2022. Last year, it ranked 12th in the world with $93 billion in total American investment -- including acquisitions of existing companies, according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis._
[Corporate media is reporting that Trump is trying to undo the damage](https://substack.com/redirect/af8176d7-e350-4773-8cbd-4553abd29dbd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), but the damage has been done. While it might not scuttle the deal currently in place, more investment coming from private sources in South Korea is now in doubt.
It wasn't before.
And given the backlash this is receiving in South Korea, I'd be skeptical of South Korean companies increasing their investments in the US.
Let's see what else we've lost thanks to _Stephen Miller 's Traveling Fascist Circus_. I'm gonna stick with travel and hospitality since that's an industry in which I worked, and understand well:
* Auto travel from Canada to the United States: Down 38%
* Air travel from Canada to the United States: Down 25%
* The US Travel Association projected the U.S. would see a $200.8 billion _**increase**_ in revenue from 2024 to 2025 from foreign tourism. Instead, we're now projected to take a $30 billion dollar loss this year.
* Canadian boycott on U.S. goods: American Whiskey is _**down**_ in some markets, such as Ontario, _as much as 80%_ (Canada used to be the biggest export market for Kentucky & Tennessee Bourbon Whiskey)
* Iconic American brands such as Coca-Cola, Jack Daniels, Philadelphia Cream Cheese, and Hellman's have all seen significant drops in their market share overseas. Del Monte filed for Chapter 13 Bankruptcy earlier this year because of the tariffs.

I could go on, walk you through the Trump-induced economic fallout in numerous industries: Construction, Agriculture, Government Services, Healthcare, Hospitality, Business, Academia.
Every category of our economy has already been deeply impacted, and it's only going to get worse. A lot worse.
Those South Korean autoworkers arrested and detained in Georgia weren't the first to be mistakenly scooped up by Trump's American Gestapo, and they certainly won't be the last.
And why?
So some small minded, SPF-90-skinned bigots can feel just a bit more superior. But the price we're all going to pay for that is already steep and getting worse.
So be prepared in the coming months every time you look in your wallet.

clean_body: MAGA wants us poor, broke, and subservient to White Elites | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? MAGA wants us poor, broke, and subservient to White Elites | | | Sep 14 | | | | | | | | | | | | Take Advantage of Cliff 's Note: This is the first contributor column by our new COO, Fred Poag. Everyone give Fred a warm welcome, and read this piece! We 're lucky to him him! | | ---|---|--- This image from video provided by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement via DVIDS shows manufacturing plant employees waiting to have their legs shackled at the Hyundai Motor Group's electric vehicle plant, Thursday, Sept. 4, 2025, in Ellabell, Ga. (Corey Bullard/U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement via AP)caption.. On September 5th, 2025 an electric automotive battery plant that's still under development in Georgia was raided by ICE. Over 450 workers were detained and many arrested. Three hundred of those were South Korean workers. To date it's the largest single ICE raid in US history. And . These workers were under the B-1 Business Visitor Visa program, which is short term not a long-term visa meant to establish residency and ultimately obtain U.S. Citizenship. They were in Georgia to get Hyundai's electric battery plant up and running. The plant, located west of Savannah in Ellabell, Georgia, was an economic development project that was projected to bring in billions of dollars to the region. But now it's anyone's guess as to whether Hyundai will want to actually keep the plant or scrap the whole thing. One thing is almost certain, any expansion plans for Hyundai in the region--or U.S. in general--will be under serious reconsideration. Dixieland Delights: Institutional Racism with a side of Secession | | ---|---|--- "We regard every man in our midst an enemy to the institutions of the South, who does not boldly declare that he believes African slavery to be a social, moral, and political blessing." - Atlanta Confederacy, 1860 Back when I lived in East Tennessee in 2012, I saw up close the cost of voting against your own economic interests for the sake of bigotry. It's been part of a long tradition in the South--to economically cut off your nose to spite your face. Even if that cutting is designed to only help a certain class of elites. It's why the South ultimately seceded over the issue of slavery in 1861 even though there was a dedicated, vocal minority opposition that were capitalist. They were also largely racist, but understood that the institution of Black Slavery was costing them economic opportunities at home and abroad. As a history professor of mine liked to say "It's easier to change the name of the god on the temple than it is to change the practice." And The United States has had a shit ton of practice. Gimme that Olde Tyme Bigotry | | ---|---|--- U.S. Sen. Eric Schmitt, of Missouri, speaking in Washington on Tuesday September 2nd, 2025. Dominic Gwinn/ZUMA Press Wire via Reuters Connect What is an American? ... The white Europeans who settled America and conquered the West... believed they were forging a nation--a homeland for themselves and their descendants. They fought, they bled, they struggled, they died for us. They built this country for us. America, in all its glory, is their gift to us, handed down across the generations. It belongs to us. It 's our birthright, our heritage, our destiny. If America is everything and everyone, then it is nothing and no one at all. But we know that's not true. America is not a 'universal nation'. , junior United States Senator from Missouri, at the fifth annual National Conservatism Conference. The NCC is an organization that proclaims their mission is to stand in opposition to China and the "powerful new Marxism at home." But that they also "see the rich tradition of national conservative thought as an intellectually serious alternative to the excesses of purist libertarianism, and in stark opposition to political theories grounded in race." Translation: Anything outside of White, Patriarchal Christian Nationalist America lacks value. In fact, we 're going to stand in opposition to it. So the role of the Spanish in American history; colonizing Texas, the entire Southwest...even cities like Los Angeles that still bear Spanish names. They were obviously White too, right? Nope. Not according to Eric Schmitt, who specifically mentioned The Pilgrims, but subtly, to give himself some wiggle room. We Americans are the sons and daughters of the Christian pilgrims that poured out from Europe 's shores to baptize a new world in their ancient faith. Our ancestors were driven here by destiny, possessed by urgent and fiery conviction, by burning belief, devoted to their cause and their God. Now all of this might seem like just a casual, overgeneralized sentiment, but it's a carefully crafted speech. The use of the word "pilgrim" is purposeful. Because even though many on religious journeys are of referred to as a pilgrims, when Americans use that word it conjures images of men with belt buckles on steeple gates carrying blunderbusses. There's a mythology built up that supports a particular image with that word. Namely, White and Protestant. | | ---|---|--- Here's . Words like "fiery" and "burning" as terms of conviction and belief. He's talking about his ancestors doing it for "their beliefs" and "their God," which just happen to be the same as his beliefs and his God. Those words are meant to conjure up an image of an exclusionary God. One for whom many non-believers were burnt at the stake, and for whom another dark tradition was founded in which Missouri is heavily steeped. | | ---|---|--- Picture in the Art Institute of Chicago. KKK Cross Burning photo taken in 1937. Photographer Unknown The Collections Calls for White Supremacy are Coming In | | ---|---|--- Protesters stage a rally against the detention of South Korean workers during an immigration raid in Georgia, near the U.S. Embassy in Seoul, South Korea, Tuesday, Sept. 9, 2025. The signs read "A tariff bomb and workers confinement." (AP Photo/Ahn Young-joon) So what was the South Korean government's response to the ICE raid in Georgia? According to the AP South Korea is already considering withdrawing from their plant in Georgia. South Korea, already a top investor, pledged to invest $350 billion in the U.S. when the two sides announced a trade deal in July. It made more investments in new construction, such as factories, on previously undeveloped land than any other country in 2022. Last year, it ranked 12th in the world with $93 billion in total American investment -- including acquisitions of existing companies, according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis. , but the damage has been done. While it might not scuttle the deal currently in place, more investment coming from private sources in South Korea is now in doubt. It wasn't before. And given the backlash this is receiving in South Korea, I'd be skeptical of South Korean companies increasing their investments in the US. Let's see what else we've lost thanks to Stephen Miller 's Traveling Fascist Circus. I'm gonna stick with travel and hospitality since that's an industry in which I worked, and understand well: Auto travel from Canada to the United States: Down 38% Air travel from Canada to the United States: Down 25% The US Travel Association projected the U.S. would see a $200.8 billion increase in revenue from 2024 to 2025 from foreign tourism. Instead, we're now projected to take a $30 billion dollar loss this year. Canadian boycott on U.S. goods: American Whiskey is down in some markets, such as Ontario, as much as 80% (Canada used to be the biggest export market for Kentucky & Tennessee Bourbon Whiskey) Iconic American brands such as Coca-Cola, Jack Daniels, Philadelphia Cream Cheese, and Hellman's have all seen significant drops in their market share overseas. Del Monte filed for Chapter 13 Bankruptcy earlier this year because of the tariffs. I could go on, walk you through the Trump-induced economic fallout in numerous industries: Construction, Agriculture, Government Services, Healthcare, Hospitality, Business, Academia. Every category of our economy has already been deeply impacted, and it's only going to get worse. A lot worse. Those South Korean autoworkers arrested and detained in Georgia weren't the first to be mistakenly scooped up by Trump's American Gestapo, and they certainly won't be the last. And why? So some small minded, SPF-90-skinned bigots can feel just a bit more superior. But the price we're all going to pay for that is already steep and getting worse. So be prepared in the coming months every time you look in your wallet. Take Advantage of You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

clean_body: | ~ | I have a personal ask, Peter. My midmonth fundraising deadline is tomorrow, and we’re still $8,290 short of our September midmonth goal. That doesn’t work – so I’ve got to ask for your help getting over the line. Every dollar is accounted for in our 2025 plans, so we really can’t fall short. It’s us against fascism in a fight to organize, mobilize, and keep me fighting in Congress. I cannot do this without you. ~ Listen, Peter. I’m not a typical Representative. I was in school more recently than most members of Congress’ kids were. I don’t have millionaire friends, or connections to big donors. I got here by relying on everyday people, and together, we built a movement, dollar by dollar. But now that we’re facing attacks from Trump and his MAGA henchmen, we need to prove that our movement can stand the test of time, against all odds. I know if our grassroots coalition steps up we can 100% be prepared for the work ahead. It just has to happen now, and we cannot wait til the last second, not in a fight like this. ~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | ~~ Thanks, Maxwell Frost | ~ Maxwell Alejandro Frost is an organizer representing Florida's 10th Congressional District. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Trump’s allies control Virginia’s top offices. We can change that.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
Derek, [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
This November, Virginians will have our first chance to reject Donald Trump’s extreme MAGA policies at the ballot box since his return to office.
Republicans control all three statewide offices right now — governor, lieutenant governor, and attorney general — and we can flip them all, with your help.
Will you split a donation between Virginia’s statewide Democratic candidates? Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi, and Jay Jones are working around the clock to win their races, but they can’t do it alone. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
In the past eight months (even though it feels much longer!), Trump's policies have done immense harm to the American economy, working families, and businesses across the country. But right now, we have the chance to elect leaders who will actually stand up to Trump.
Abigail Spanberger is a patriotic public servant and proven leader who will protect Virginia families and restore common-sense leadership. Ghazala Hashmi is a champion for education, opportunity, and reproductive freedom. Jay Jones is a fighter for justice and equal rights for every Virginian. Together, they will move our Commonwealth forward — not backward.
I’m doing everything I can to support Democrats up and down the ticket, but with early voting beginning in just five days, Abigail, Ghazala, and Jay need a swell of grassroots support to power their campaigns.
Will you split a donation today to help flip Virginia’s statewide leadership blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=20]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025-slate]
This is our chance to deliver real change for Virginians — and a clear rebuke to this reckless, lawless administration.
—Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

body:
Democrat Debra Shigley is competing to flip a seat in the state Senate. We have a chance to chip away at the Republican majority in a critical swing state. | | |

1. In just nine days, DLCC Spotlight candidate Debra Shigley is facing a **runoff** with a chance to **_flip_** a seat in the Georgia state Senate and **_flip_** her district blue for the first time in over a decade.
2. If Debra is elected, she will fight for **stronger** public school funding, **expanded** access to affordable health care, and a **lower cost** of living for working families.
3. This runoff election is a prime opportunity to **weaken** the GOP’s hold on the Georgia legislature and **empower** local Democratic leaders working to safeguard our freedoms from Trump and his stateside allies.

[It’s all hands on deck until polls close in Georgia’s runoff election. We have a chance to chip away at the Republican majority in a critical swing state. | | | | | ---|--- Three things you need to know about Georgia’s September 23rd runoff election: 1. In just nine days, DLCC Spotlight candidate Debra Shigley is facing a runoff with a chance to flip a seat in the Georgia state Senate and flip her district blue for the first time in over a decade. 2. If Debra is elected, she will fight for stronger public school funding, expanded access to affordable health care, and a lower cost of living for working families. 3. name: you approve of the Electoral College?? via Fight For Reform
subject: this could change everything (Reich’s warning)
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) Team, this is AMAZING!!!

[ **Look at what Robert Reich just said about the Electoral College → **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=3&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=4&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) **He’s exactly right:** Donald Trump would have NEVER won the presidency in 2016 if it weren’t for the Electoral College.

We couldn’t agree with him more, team, but we’re unsure if local Democrats like you feel the same way.

So we’re launching a nationwide poll to see what Democrats from across the country think of the Electoral College. [ **As a Top Democrat from your area, please tell us:
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=5&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=6&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=7&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=8&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
Team, the numbers don’t lie: Republicans have only won the popular vote **TWICE** in the last 35 years... but they’ve captured the presidency **FOUR** times.

Why? Because of the Electoral College – _a system that overrides the will of the people and hands power to a few swing states._

[ **It’s outdated, unfair, and flat-out undemocratic!!**

](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=9&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) THANKFULLY, Democrats in Congress are stepping up with a Constitutional Amendment to abolish the Electoral College once and for all.

But we need to prove that Americans from all over the country are behind this movement – and that starts with you, team.
[ **So please, represent local Democrats and tell us:
Do you support abolishing the Electoral College? ** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=10&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
| | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=11&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=12&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=13&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)
---
[ We’re collecting responses until MIDNIGHT, and your input is critical. If we don’t show overwhelming grassroots support, we risk losing momentum at a pivotal moment. ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=14&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)

[ **Add your voice before the deadline. Let’s send a message loud and clear: It’s time to let the people decide.**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/68771?t=15&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)

– Fight For Reform
| This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com
[ _Click here to get fewer emails._](https://act.fightforreform.org/signup/Less-Emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=16&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW) | [_Click here to unsubscribe._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2022?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&t=17&akid=23399%2E4449941%2ErdbtTW)

FEC_ decision completely changed the landscape of American politics -- it opened the door for billionaires, corporations, and special interests to spend unlimited, untraceable money to influence our elections.

Your support is critical to helping us reject the Big Money status quo in states and cities across the country by electing champions of campaign finance reform and voting rights to state government, and passing reform ballot initiatives.
With your support we can harness the power of our grassroots supporters to influence decision makers and put control back in the hands of the people.

name: Roy Cooper
subject: There’s no one I’d rather have with me.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
Can I count on you? |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218391/569577835/823540626?refcode=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE1NzBjZi1iYTkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t11F-wy8yLtu4q81HxR6aBmmzY6IL5BDY9oJGd64Elw=&emci=e91570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=17205535)
Peter — the campaign we’re undertaking here in North Carolina is not one that I can win alone, and we cannot afford to lose. _It’s so important to me to have you with me._ I know you share my commitment to core democratic values like the necessity of a peaceful transfer of power, the importance of due process, and the promise that each of us can make our voice heard at the ballot box. I know you share my fears about extreme Republicans going to great lengths to roll back fundamental freedoms like the right to abortion care. I know you share my anger at the prospect of billionaires getting a handout at the expense of the most vulnerable Americans. **[I can see what the GOP has in store for our country, Peter, and I think we can do better. Today, I’m humbly asking you to donate to help us get there. Please give anything you can before our mid-September deadline tomorrow to help hit our goal and flip this U.S. Senate seat blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218392/569577836/-1743631236?refcode=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE1NzBjZi1iYTkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t11F-wy8yLtu4q81HxR6aBmmzY6IL5BDY9oJGd64Elw=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218393/569577837/-1743631236?refcode=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE1NzBjZi1iYTkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t11F-wy8yLtu4q81HxR6aBmmzY6IL5BDY9oJGd64Elw=)**
---
Thank you,
Roy Cooper
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218394/569577838/-1743631236?refcode=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ms=ea.ea1570cf-ba91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYTE1NzBjZi1iYTkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=t11F-wy8yLtu4q81HxR6aBmmzY6IL5BDY9oJGd64Elw=)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Robert Garcia
subject: RESPONSE REQUESTED: Do you support Democratic efforts to fight back against Republican gerrymandering?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
Add your name >>
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218484/569578135/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=)
Hi folks, it’s Democratic Congressman Robert Garcia.
A crisis is unfolding in Texas — and it’s a battle for the future of our democracy.
Republicans, under pressure from Donald Trump, are pushing a mid-decade redistricting plan that could add five new GOP congressional seats, tipping the scales in Washington before voters have their say.
But Democrats aren’t just standing by and giving in. Texas lawmakers are fighting back — even fleeing the state, and putting their own jobs and freedom on the line — to block the vote.
And now, Democratic leaders in California, New York, and elsewhere are looking at their options to beat the Republicans at their own game.
**[That’s why I’m reaching out today. As Republicans try to rig the system in their favor, I want to know what you think. So let me know: Do YOU support Democratic efforts to fight back against Republican gerrymandering?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218485/569578136/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=&emci=3b8fdd2a-b491-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9d0b0bb-bc91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
[HELL YES >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218486/569578137/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=&emci=3b8fdd2a-b491-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9d0b0bb-bc91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
[NO >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218487/569578138/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=&emci=3b8fdd2a-b491-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9d0b0bb-bc91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
[UNSURE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218488/569578139/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=&emci=3b8fdd2a-b491-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9d0b0bb-bc91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)
I mean it when I say that democracy is on the line here.
Gerrymandering isn’t just political gamesmanship — it silences communities and weaponizes our votes.
It’s not just Texas’ fight. Blue states are preparing to push back with fair maps of their own, demanding that voters choose their representatives and not the other way around.
**But it’s risky. Our colleagues in Texas face fines, arrest warrants, and legal threats. They’re putting it all on the line, and we must stand with them.**
**[This isn’t a sideshow. This is a fight over whether our democracy will serve people or politicians. So I have to ask: Will you stand with Democrats as we fight back against these Republican gerrymanders?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218489/569578140/169640552?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=&emci=3b8fdd2a-b491-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&emdi=f9d0b0bb-bc91-f011-b484-6045bdeb7413&ceid=16877361)**
We’re not just fighting maps. We’re fighting for accountability, representation, and truth in politics.
Thanks for using your voice,
Robert Garcia
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/115218490/569578141/789508428?REFCODE=250914_RG_standwithdems-PET-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmOWQwYjBiYi1iYzkxLWYwMTEtYjQ4NC02MDQ1YmRlYjc0MTMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FT4O4AMLiImZhIs_IF7QD1GLU7brAiDTYlCjoWPQGxc=)

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: $5 to win in Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

**$5,** Peter.
That is the contribution I’m asking you to make — today — to my reelection campaign here in Georgia.
**$5** because winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse this descent toward one-man rule.
**$5** because if the GOP flips this seat red and turns Georgia red, they will lock in control of the Senate for years to come.
**$5** because there is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.
You might think that a single $5 contribution can’t make a difference in an election as expensive and competitive as this one.
But as you read this, lots and lots of people are chipping in their own $5 — and it adds up fast when lots of people chip in.
[**Please use this link to make a $5 contribution to my reelection campaign today. My team and I will put your donation right to work WINNING this U.S. Senate race.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250914-2-f&t=1&akid=759%2E5691347%2E7491b5)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-sep25.SYBMcx&refcode=em250914-2-f&t=2&akid=759%2E5691347%2E7491b5)**
Gratefully,
Jon Ossoff

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=3&akid=759%2E5691347%2E7491b5) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=759%2E5691347%2E7491b5) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
