name: Candace Owens
subject: Why Candace Owens Partners With PreBorn!
body:
I’ve spent years listening to the abortion debate. | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/uzDivsCGHEz-yGdMrUOAAiickPWNRGrVTWtFj98EdiU3W0C5ZILB92Ok8yVTSi-eKwkXe5zHmJYNT3np0AnwFq2ydmcymZbEpy3h1MuAzNiexpP7Lfu0lxPuAl3Bi363oAxANTtmfJ2YXsrrLhwoBaoQuBuzkxhiqiOi_AMWkMhAiIBdBN9zCvcO/VvCxZ33su0HnFDRyK38MbERNL_JyB_1R/12)_
| | Fellow American,

I've spent years listening to the abortion debate. I've heard the pro-choice arguments. And I've rejected them.
But I've also heard a lot of voices on the conservative side, loud voices that haven't sat right with me either. Too many are angry. Too many are performative. And too few are actually doing something to help women. That's why I chose to stand with PreBorn! _[**Because they are not just talking about life. They are showing up for it.**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/3IYxnZstCEQaS-eNMs6Lp5a76NosjTAVhzWfCh6ZbtxC_Np7tRRfy1WvnxrqjsbUuQs5dgydSzo6c6DQzIfMGiXMa5Ma_5gcpAiLrQrYxrlf1jLbA_O-krsx7AvWWX7es8gJD4BS6UjWUr3eKR8ueSvDZeiEm1mmpv9XpgfV_-9eIdOuJ5erjmSVK4hgfddgKqoiBCL0SGCs2lwjWaaXTDgA7RhKZekIHzPooWX4bWIm490gkGiqueb0dfSH-0PFOIjJi77N3Utrm_GDS9Z8O8eoy4o5qss4VFo78d1lMuD4K3MFZryJ0_2RdgVtzP30S82xKrLXK0nNHq67aeyjNX8UDuR0qQt6UIBX668bBdHeU8RGx61ieSRkqNP-mwWg38kwRVEyo6qNkCDxTc_4ZoxduAsomQqj7ah-pR72wq003J5uXBlSZ7KyuzjA7dsVGIvfEAqS_G-3m7-kV4HHr3ITxnoXW6_P47kvRAUKTR3mw2FqN-l_pkc6CbFzEbJ2mV5smIf_jwo00LWAlgnAYc7xKpXDXnko7MDDRNTCNA4fPS_hjkY4MrpN5NNmfRLAw949j0Fr1TGJiJ60ghAStoUrOsu6lt1bHRVeL0mOfQCGB9etwNoTVTqeFkvfqAG9eVOdywUHxd4gdKIzdn7O1jR4eroW4NVeghcjoJhpR1yiPGE/upFTU2B8bJtv4v2xWkc_D2K8p5TMsY_j/12)_ They meet women who are scared and alone. They offer them a free ultrasound. They help them see the truth . . . that there's a living child inside them. And they do it all with love, not shame. But they don't stop there.

PreBorn! stays.

They walk with that mother for up to two years, providing real support, material help, and a relationship grounded in dignity and faith.
---
**This is the kind of voice I 've been waiting to hear in the pro-life space.**
---
[](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/S3dmgpvv5mrzEupMXK5oHPXTjWbjC_zSRgYDLmahISdvRqzylI7hEXU84lZbhDsSIA7mh4OHXClVe6YLHSqXzSBh1ttJhEcNM_UGSmoEbH1r7wgwwXpkdl-MR4si42VUYQkPQrIvuq6Vve8Ese_F8ZyygDZlmobHrKF3hAoIrt5TNSiOJBoAQwLcqfv29xWQa-VQkWTnw8UqVukIE9W6w2t0vD6LFJIb53Nq_KRFsM-P_7-ArGAHe_HotGSfRk5rP44F29eMcjUm7sYxifkSpkV5PMBcblvi_GYczbiVu-ih4vnH0dzfKJf4v9R0MOuAbhmcY3uC0x02g0kTax2V4z-z0PCREGy2rIcTniKQ7QUkkAZ14SWpeAl0TFFrvyNbLe59h04EI-fBfM1cD6o_QwRfb_9Ywvthg6w8tTWXXu4fGuIViWXM_-Q5cZZAry_Sn55KCclFX5M6aG-FQzCYn-vSwoQ_8slNTvtleltY0avwg2bvo5SgdAoPiIQWd-4pKoLSLlhxsYGKaLwQitr5d4S4oGee3RUxXvbgdrlgQOHbov4cWhdjXtlfiFg_eez_-K2DFpkYDyHol9J-BxgTZx6X8cNpyhkURd3ubyeo8owOc-PGSdURVuUi1zyGTswcEGf-yHPA7KzW8wlSIkwz5m6Gp8Hyw9iCz6a1jLQBMyv8BgQ/ce0-BDwU3Acrt48WpBQcQwC3dq2Oe_uw/12)
---
And this is why I've partnered with them. Now I'm asking you to join me. Just $28 provides a life-saving ultrasound.
It could be the moment a mother chooses life for her baby and opens her heart to a new future.
---
[_**Give to PreBorn! Today >>**_](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/p7X-8Ex0xIzTG9WSDSnKQatGODWxuqWegJYU9085O1x18f6ky1Q6YWN4xDVXe8U7t1mL3Yek7ce3br9lDHn7qpbYHg0ihwG7ZgxhCB9B9VeANv_uAKbSa2MDjzRgVoIB6vLqfRJGyQqWkg9s97muw1QoMIf1hp-FC9AfRgRo-lLbAvOCAC63u3gUZPVGlGnLMgANzWv8wyKKjvEoVsHnGMlKcRA0-x7dwEjfwTA86RJHMf92fN3ZJv3GfIgrIUANd4_cL2A4QXWSTmAH001AVFxqA6iYvy2ZNwGuu8O4V3tMrSZgmNbk3MDUXOvha7q4ZtpP1TadTBUfHmjLjfTndlLLHZDvo8oxg_oQqjYjJahLpCzz57mTX0sdOFhMp_6hn-SazWS_N6X8kuQmL_Q0Zo8lkHGs4vbIAI7dLNlYMBt6xLDTgNXRPhl5yHvei6oTege_poZUfo4_i65SOv9H78vz1a9E_UTJ-qugC2aGVuTJE9HKP_jax5cU7gBJ-FdEcNqa5VxfFfEm4dGvUgTdNjNQE2JHoivvL3y0H2SRRaFglLU1oML54eaRE8tO517jvD8Ss1oBkqK70vanBr6hjZIu1W7y0nQpvW4VlR4n8h9M_joqp8oDWErkkTzWyqYCcWZF15zdvrAxxsOScxzFZbA3K4fxjGFH0msf64ywohZYzDk/mIy2mr375pfoDJ6U6uhI4j5xwLbUdvUU/12)
---
I don't lend my voice lightly.
But I've seen what PreBorn! is doing.
They're saving babies. They're standing with mothers. They're doing the work that matters. And they are not stopping. Let's support the people who are actually making a difference. For Life,
Candace Owens
Supporting Partner of PreBorn!
---
[Unsubscribe from messages sponsored by PreBorn.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/u/XkuxEpPTMGuAP3FNr08Cb2ITiEq4fKLi-aP9uWZ9Fai61LLpzr-AF7i3hLBVKOy5JHp2yEFA3_VCrqjKHkycmePj5AFx3VZahIIw4O68_66MwIXfMR7cZFoRU8FwvFssG_O5c-LhNv0vsqWS1k_ZQSyeDN__GNaYFdCgZ_1_mMboCtwCYs3CllK-i-mAjnS8KcIdTooMyfWcB6aqILBGblVVaSxHTpZ5hA/tRMbg3EMb7WaH750_3nWcUzN3KI0Z5FP/12)

subject: 🚨 Big endorsement alert 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
As Governor, Katie will work hand-in-hand with folks like the hardworking members of UAW that help California thrive.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40145%2E3422442%2EkhY7Qd)
Peter,
In case you missed it: UAW endorsed Katie’s campaign for governor. 🥳
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250914_2_ak?refcode=em20250914-40145&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40145_3422442_khY7Qd&akid=40145%2E3422442%2EkhY7Qd)
We’re honored to have UAW’s support in this race—and the backing of so many Californians who share Katie’s vision for a more affordable state.
For generations, UAW has been on the front lines for working people. From marching during the civil rights movement to organizing for safer workplaces today, they’ve fought to make sure ordinary Californians aren’t left behind.
As governor, Katie will work hand-in-hand with folks like the hardworking members of UAW that help California thrive. But to win this race, it’s going to take all of us.
**[Can you join UAW in supporting Katie by pitching in $5 today? Your donation will help us reach our $10,000 mid-month fundraising goal, spread Katie’s message, and build the broad coalition it will take to win.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250914_2_ak?refcode=em20250914-40145&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=40145_3422442_khY7Qd&akid=40145%2E3422442%2EkhY7Qd)**

Katie Porter HQ

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250914-40145&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=40145_3422442_khY7Qd&akid=40145%2E3422442%2EkhY7Qd)**

name: Lily Tang Williams
subject: Charlie Kirk -- Champion of Free Speech & Civil Discourse
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/charlie-kirk-champion-of-free-speech-civil-discourse?e=c338950e03)
---
| |
---
| |
# Charlie Kirk -- Champion of Free Speech & Civil Discourse
Being American means having the freedom to speak, debate, and engage in civil discourse. Charlie Kirk did that.

Charlie’s tragic murder while speaking with students is a wake-up call for all of us.

I lived through the Cultural Revolution. I experienced and understand how political rhetoric inspired violence to be carried out by Mao’s Red Guards, mostly young students, which ultimately led to the deaths of 20 million people.

Mao's propaganda was emotional and was used to brainwash youth to turn them against Mao's political enemies so he could regain political power. His tactic was to create divisions and hatred between the so-called oppressed against their oppressors, mostly people just next door.

We must stop the radicalization of our youth by biased grievance studies, divisive media, and by politicians demonizing those they disagree with.

It is time to bring us back together.

**E pluribus unum!**

May God bless Charlie’s family and USA!

Watch my video on X here: [https://x.com/i/status/1967306106855710833](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=2a91abb8d5&e=c338950e03)

name: Erika Kirk
subject: My cries will echo around the world like a battle cry.
body:
Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever.
We will never surrender. Ever.

| | | [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=3596497a961346258e7712084d59e91c&_e=3upmDBYaicqP_ud8SolS4ezivT1pLt5JSxSPwIx91dTldabyNrwif9PFxaZi0Mr3h2W436bsgm7tWegcVN_oUihI1TcHiXKQXjFL9AX2jJ_Q8zpbuMMpcaSisrZZIjijbFzYXrv2xBhtcGHJxAr4peVNvK8Y_tQrg8fbt0aAYGtnPFAPrEY_Vf_52uBEwR-c-P7lvoDUQabkiu8lV1zM0cnXxtghPR2Hlue0P86EVBiPf1TqYyyHkLA237HWRYmqqWi0lZl59_2-u8dSQPKfMzG9CEabtWGXLJWErkxQFxiju3PQmSuZHSxkmF86_xUaM4plyU9AYWrggjuFZTh6BZ7jjrBVLDfBzDU_Ve3ILL-9UpYAdZAkLVFrI9IljooNkKh8hKNaTSwx28tPFPjgmGvMFFBXCPbiJLqgLw6dVuC7WE29ehaxE4el2toHnnqoF8eFjCzG3qZs4IOk_8yM_1I3-oIVUnltd7KEZa_lQxmVBmmXVIWGqw9m_jUWnSOUmkl3Q2phmpEj2XuYa291cm20saauEUIknwChq8HtbTifk5pS7boS5ieuQhxcCOztErTgaIu9VnvqJVpR9IUj2u-AmCH5OrXkj9gMfDn7K8X0gGG_1-Z5P6ty4US7YwkseLv1WZ5Uk1DKT06mysh_P7wSCKNvp5WFiXdDNKjwvQYeQBfsPy1uihUANQUfnCZJ0KniAL_yJNgjs2B9rphsKQ%3D%3D)
---
Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, _I need you to listen closely..._ **Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. ** They didn't just try to silence a man...
They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. **If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... ****_They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED._** **Not just across this country...**_**_But in me_**** _._**_ They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die.
**_I refuse to let that happen._** And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life.
[**I want you to watch. I want you to hear what Charlie meant to me. clean_body: Charlie’s mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. We will never surrender. Ever. | | | Friend, I want to thank you for loving my husband. For standing with us in the worst days of our lives. For praying. For mourning. For remembering. But now, I need you to listen closely... Because the evildoers who took Charlie 's life? They have NO idea what they have done. They didn't just try to silence a man... They tried to silence his message -- a message of patriotism, of faith, and of God's merciful love. Instead, they ignited something even greater. If they thought my husband 's mission was powerful before... They have NO idea what they have just UNLEASHED. Not just across this country...But in me . They have no idea the fire they've lit inside this wife. And to those listening across America... Let me be clear: The movement my husband built will not die. I refuse to let that happen. And I know all of us will refuse to let that happen, too. Charlie's mission will grow: Stronger. Bolder. Louder. Greater than ever. I shared these words publicly, from my heart -- just two days after I lost the love of my life. Charlie gave everything for this country. And I will never stop speaking his name. We will not let the light he lit go out. Not now. Not ever. For Charlie, Erika Kirk On behalf of the Turning Point USA Family P.S. Charlie always said: " Never surrender." He built something bigger than himself -- and now we must carry it forward. If you believe in what he stood for... if you refuse to let Charlie's vision die... 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

clean_body: Peter, this is a big month for the campaign. | | | Peter, this is a big month for the campaign. September is the last month of the fundraising quarter, which means the amount we raise by September 30 will send a message about our campaign’s strength. Our numbers will be public, and they’ll show everyone exactly how many individual donors stood with Brianna this quarter. Let's make sure that number reflects the true strength of this campaign! As State Treasurer, Brianna will: Protect and grow Colorado's investments responsibly Ensure transparency in how taxpayer dollars are managed Support small businesses and working families Fight for every public employee to receive a secure and stable retirement. name: Gavin Newsom
subject: A great rebuke to map-rigging Republicans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yes on 50, The Election Rigging Response Act, Governor Newsom’s Ballot Measure Committee
body:
Tomorrow at midnight.

**Tomorrow at midnight.**
It's one of few critical internal deadlines we've set on the campaign. And when it ends we're going to take stock of what we've raised and make some very difficult spending decisions that will impact the outcome of this race.
The truth is, we are getting outraised and outspent. Republicans are rigging maps in several states and they know that if they can stop us here, they will control the House for the next several elections.
We would love to expand our buys so Californians are seeing our ads as much as theirs. But we don't have one person spending $30 million to make it happen.
We rely on donations from lots and lots of people who understand we are talking about control of Congress and a check on Trump's power. And as a reminder, people start voting in just a few weeks.
So before our deadline ends tomorrow night, we're coming to you with a last-ditch request:
[**Please use this link to contribute $3 or whatever you can afford to Gavin Newsom's ballot measure committee. Our average donation is $30. Many give more. Some give less. All that matters is that Democrats everywhere who care chip in today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/erra-em?refcode=em250914&refcode2=2545_4767699_d5fHom&akid=2545%2E4767699%2Ed5fHom)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

name: Jena
subject: Can’t do this without you, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
Friends – this campaign has already been so inspiring. From meeting with Coloradans across the state to joining union members on Labor Day, I can’t tell you how honored I am to get to build so many meaningful relationships out on the trail.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
We are closing in on a year out from the election, so now is the time to ensure we have the funding it takes to keep getting out to all of the different events across the state. This part of the campaign is so rewarding, but it requires resources.
That’s why we’ve set a $2,500 goal – so we can keep traveling the state and meeting Coloradans where they are. Can you chip in to help us get there? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
This is the work that moves the needle, and it’s also the best part of running for office. I hope to keep it up all the way through next November. To do that, I’ll need support from people like you. Grassroots donations take us far, so even a $5 donation can help us get to where we need to be.
Can you chip in $5, $10, or $15 right now to help us reach our $2,500 goal? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2509-q3-jg]
Thank you so much,
Jena

name: State Democrats HQ
subject: We need your response on this, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
New York Times: DOGE Put Critical Social Security Data at Risk, Whistle-Blower Says
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94930?t=1&akid=9417%2E614464%2ErdPmiZ)
**Last month, another U.S. court confirmed that Elon Musk’s Department of Government Efficiency can legally access the personal data of MILLIONS of Americans like you.** _Now, we have confirmation that they have mishandled it._** **This includes _sensitive information._** Social Security numbers. Phone numbers. Health records. Employment records. Addresses. We think most Americans would agree on this... **DOGE shouldn’t be anywhere near our private information.** But after this news, we want to confirm with you, Peter: **Do YOU oppose DOGE accessing your personal data?** **[YES — I'M OPPOSED](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94930?t=2&akid=9417%2E614464%2ErdPmiZ)** **[NO — I SUPPORT IT](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94930?t=3&akid=9417%2E614464%2ErdPmiZ)** **[I'M NOT SURE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/94930?t=4&akid=9417%2E614464%2ErdPmiZ)**

body:
You know me–I’ve spent my life standing up for Tennesseans, from protecting children after school tragedies to fighting for

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-W4TvkqEL5ncGkOgGCyP-Q~~/AAUS1hA~/D0NZRb325QcQ7d48UzpGm30QoRUsbD0zbQtr1PtwWUuiKy82hkjZAB7z_reA1No-qOWnaXZDcmQnmyZ7PngIRKaWNoYOytYLDQioIUYrX7n-XNe8XWFnD-oCKB3YeZXI61wNqU_3s0_RfLhz0NIRcs5kVe_BzTqa1lxm8VfDRvI~)
| | | | Hi there, this is Gloria Johnson. You know me – I’ve spent my life standing up for Tennesseans, from protecting children after school tragedies to fighting for teachers and families who’ve been left behind. I’ve faced redistricting, tough elections, and powerful opposition, but I’ve never backed down. Real change happens when leaders put people first. [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VLg2_gU6VgT11SKW4yq37w~~/AAUS1hA~/Hdul6f0h4PME-63xBy7zJSSUqqPnrQ8LhyXUvXhqLKFQnHuH2raWb78LOgwJnL3TrXzNn_67o_OOiqilKo2WIj3de9nzjTkk3ZcC8MsvZOQ3YuXCyhfIcQhxNDnuzQYqy5uW1T3XSgArnO2aIycdBIpl41GbZcpeV0nRxxqHTL98X0bAoVs0meTAr43-Djgt2dqfb31HLG5yXSpXrlZuSh48egV_4dE0gl2U4fiOqXeTZ_oAw7euMZ_FH8K05h96hUeZ1rYh_KRtruhnsTfTOQ~~) [**That’s why I’m asking you to stand with Vincent Dixie by splitting a donation between our campaigns. Vincent is a trailblazer– the first Black leader of the House Democratic caucus in Tennessee’s history—and he doesn’t play partisan games.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VLg2_gU6VgT11SKW4yq37w~~/AAUS1hA~/Hdul6f0h4PME-63xBy7zJSSUqqPnrQ8LhyXUvXhqLKFQnHuH2raWb78LOgwJnL3TrXzNn_67o_OOiqilKo2WIj3de9nzjTkk3ZcC8MsvZOQ3YuXCyhfIcQhxNDnuzQYqy5uW1T3XSgArnO2aIycdBIpl41GbZcpeV0nRxxqHTL98X0bAoVs0meTAr43-Djgt2dqfb31HLG5yXSpXrlZuSh48egV_4dE0gl2U4fiOqXeTZ_oAw7euMZ_FH8K05h96hUeZ1rYh_KRtruhnsTfTOQ~~) He’s here for everyday families, **expanding educational opportunities, fighting corruption, and championing the suspension of the grocery tax.** His work mirrors my mission: results, not politics. When we support leaders like Vincent, we help families across Tennessee get the representation they deserve. Together, we can:
* Expand access to healthcare for families in every corner of our state
* Protect public education and give teachers the respect and resources they deserve
* Stand up to corruption and put people before profits

Vincent will fight for Tennessee every single day– just like I do. **[Right now, you can stand with both of us. The best way to do that? Split a donation between our campaigns today, giving us the resources we need to fight for healthcare, public education, and fairness across Tennessee.](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VLg2_gU6VgT11SKW4yq37w~~/AAUS1hA~/Hdul6f0h4PME-63xBy7zJSSUqqPnrQ8LhyXUvXhqLKFQnHuH2raWb78LOgwJnL3TrXzNn_67o_OOiqilKo2WIj3de9nzjTkk3ZcC8MsvZOQ3YuXCyhfIcQhxNDnuzQYqy5uW1T3XSgArnO2aIycdBIpl41GbZcpeV0nRxxqHTL98X0bAoVs0meTAr43-Djgt2dqfb31HLG5yXSpXrlZuSh48egV_4dE0gl2U4fiOqXeTZ_oAw7euMZ_FH8K05h96hUeZ1rYh_KRtruhnsTfTOQ~~)** **[**Split $20 now**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RpTe5sVAADzYsiPkgvg4lg~~/AAUS1hA~/z49RLazTo842ILGVm2JHfY0Hs676Yut0GvhvV5RJLxyZh4Ao0dyhMP5kqN0L8DjrOlIbkAt5dSLai5nsE0zeIw5u0qu7tgtKokgD_5qalf-tkO3tp-UXk1OKFNAQjRSfd0ikr4y2-EUCevKJZhjmm8W1SZhQxyoRbdmRYLTAgk-m7wAJtV0I4qI70V1yGAcjIYvt6rnJpfBmXQhV-xssyeGO6QKNq0p37yn1Km0DgkWBS6ocmuH8-NuHnDDoDx2xSNW9zspja9TPo1ldH-f3zyj_GBYGBPRTBgzZcf9V30s~) ** Thank you for standing with me– and for standing with everyday families in Tennessee. In solidarity,
Gloria Johnson [](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/VLg2_gU6VgT11SKW4yq37w~~/AAUS1hA~/Hdul6f0h4PME-63xBy7zJSSUqqPnrQ8LhyXUvXhqLKFQnHuH2raWb78LOgwJnL3TrXzNn_67o_OOiqilKo2WIj3de9nzjTkk3ZcC8MsvZOQ3YuXCyhfIcQhxNDnuzQYqy5uW1T3XSgArnO2aIycdBIpl41GbZcpeV0nRxxqHTL98X0bAoVs0meTAr43-Djgt2dqfb31HLG5yXSpXrlZuSh48egV_4dE0gl2U4fiOqXeTZ_oAw7euMZ_FH8K05h96hUeZ1rYh_KRtruhnsTfTOQ~~)

* * *
_Vincent Dixie is a small business owner, husband, and State Representative who has passed bipartisan laws, taken on corruption, and delivered real results for Tennessee families. Now he’s running for Congress to lower costs, protect Medicare and Social Security, and finally put working people first._ **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/RpTe5sVAADzYsiPkgvg4lg~~/AAUS1hA~/z49RLazTo842ILGVm2JHfY0Hs676Yut0GvhvV5RJLxyZh4Ao0dyhMP5kqN0L8DjrOlIbkAt5dSLai5nsE0zeIw5u0qu7tgtKokgD_5qalf-tkO3tp-UXk1OKFNAQjRSfd0ikr4y2-EUCevKJZhjmm8W1SZhQxyoRbdmRYLTAgk-m7wAJtV0I4qI70V1yGAcjIYvt6rnJpfBmXQhV-xssyeGO6QKNq0p37yn1Km0DgkWBS6ocmuH8-NuHnDDoDx2xSNW9zspja9TPo1ldH-f3zyj_GBYGBPRTBgzZcf9V30s~) ** **

name: Haley Stevens
subject: Trump must be checked
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
I need your help to stand up to his chaos

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5838?t=2&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
Null,

If the past few weeks have shown us anything, it’s that **we NEED a check on Donald Trump.** That’s why I’m running for Senate – and why I’m more fired up than ever.
But before I talk about Trump’s chaos, I need to ask: [**Will you chip in $5 to help us hit our critical $150,000 mid-month goal? We’re still 17% short, and the deadline is tomorrow – I’d be so grateful for your support.**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5839?t=3&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
Now, here’s why Michiganders need a Senator who isn’t afraid to stand up to Donald Trump and his MAGA allies:
🚨 Trump has been **deploying the National Guard to cities without local consent – and my opponent, MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, called for them to be sent into Detroit.** That’s not leadership. It’s fear-mongering. It was wrong in 1967, and it’s wrong now.
📝 **Trump’s name and lewd comments surfaced in newly released Epstein files** – and instead of answering for it, he’s leaning on denial and distraction. That’s not accountability. That’s cowardice.
💊 RFK Jr., a conspiracy theorist with no public health experience, is still running HHS – even after firing the CDC Director, gutting vaccine programs, and slashing lifesaving research. Trump appointed him. **I’m calling for him to resign.**
📉 **The August jobs report? A huge warning sign.** The labor market is getting weaker and weaker. Trump’s response? Denial. He said the “real numbers” were coming later.
Here’s the truth, null: **Trump isn’t looking out for working families. He’s congratulating himself while creating chaos.**
I’m in this race to fight for Michiganders – for real jobs, real accountability, and real leadership. But I can’t do it alone.

**[Will you chip in $5 before tomorrow’s midnight deadline to help me hit my $150,000 mid-month goal, keep Michigan blue, and check Trump’s chaos agenda?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5839?t=4&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5840?t=5&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5841?t=6&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5842?t=7&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5843?t=8&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
Thank you for standing with me,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5891?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/5838?t=10&akid=825%2E49239%2EGSENun)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
